Product Type: Bosch/TQ/Avinox/Levo G4 Motor type, IS Spline fit, 7075-T651 Machined Billet Alloy
Web Description:
Designed for aggressive e-MTB riding, the 5DEV R-SPEC eCranks deliver uncompromising strength, precision machining, and improved trail clearance across todays leading e-bike motor platforms.

Machined in the USA from 7075-T651 aerospace-grade aluminium billet, these cranks are built specifically for Bosch, TQ, Avinox, and Gen 4 Specialized Levo motor systems, offering outstanding stiffness, durability, and long-term reliability. The R-SPEC low-profile design reduces bulk around the pedal interface to help minimise pedal strikes on technical climbs and rocky terrain  exactly where modern e-MTBs are pushed hardest.

Shorter crank lengths improve cadence efficiency and rider control, making these cranks an ideal upgrade for trail, enduro, and e-MTB riders looking to fine-tune their setup without compromise.

Whether youre upgrading for performance, durability, or aesthetics, the 5DEV eCranks bring unmistakable CNC-machined style and proven strength to your e-MTB build.

Key Features

R-SPEC crank design for maximum strength and ground clearance
Compatible with Bosch, TQ, Avinox & Gen 4 Specialized Levo motor systems
CNC-machined from 7075-T651 aluminium billet
Short crank lengths to reduce pedal strikes and improve cadence
Includes crank bolts and self-extracting hardware
Made in the USA
Specifications

Lengths: 155 mm / 160 mm
Q-Factor: Approx. 192 mm
Weight: Approx. 440490 g (pair, length dependent)
Material: 7075-T651 Aluminium
Product Name: R-SPEC eBike Crank Arms - Bosch/TQ/Avinox/Gen 4 Levo

Product Type: Specialized Levo SL DUB type, SL Spline fit, 7075-T651 Machined Billet Alloy
Web Description:
eCranks for the new SRAM/Brose motors as well as the Gen 2 Specialized Turbo Levo SL. 

These cranks will fit any motor with the SRAM Computer or the new Specialized SL motor. 

5DEV CNC'd R-SPEC Trail Enduro Cranks for the Gen 2 Turbo Levo SL. Model year 2023+ with the SRAM Motor and Sram DUB Spline system. These cranks will not work on the first gen Turbo Levo SL Motor. 

Easy to install. Simply remove your stock cranks with a 8mm Hex and install your 5DEV Crank arms just like you would on your MTB. This system uses the same interface as the SRAM cranks.

Built for riders who throw caution to the wind and demand gear that can take a hit, the 5DEV Cam Zink 150mm cranks are engineered in collaboration with freeride legend Cam Zink and tested on the worlds wildest terrain  including Red Bull Rampage lines.

CNC machined from 7075 aluminium billet in San Diego, these crank arms are crafted to withstand the most aggressive riding you can throw at them, offering rocksolid performance and confidence inspiring durability for bikes built around Bosch, TQ, Avinox and Gen4 Specialized Levo platforms.

Whether youre slaying steep freeride laps, slashing downhill rock gardens, or simply pushing your eMTB further than ever before, the Cam Zink cranks provide strength where you need it most  so you can focus on what matters: riding harder.

Key Features
Cam Zink signature design  developed with freeride legend Cam Zink for ultimate confidence and strength.
CNC machined 7075 aluminium billet construction for maximum durability.
Engineered for Bosch & Gen4 Specialized Levo eMTB systems.
150mm crank arm length  tuned for technical terrain and peak control.
Trail ready strength with a design that stands up to freeride and downhill abuse.

Specifications

Length: 150mm

Compatibility: Bosch, TQ, Avinox & Gen4 Specialized Levo eMTB systems

Product Type: Machined Alloy, SRAM 8-Bolt fit, BB Axle NOT Included
Web Description:
It's no secret that World Tour GC contenders have been making the switch to shorter crank arms - and not just for marginal gains. Shorter cranks help smooth power balance, allow a lower, more aerodynamic position, and can be a complete game-changer for riders with hip or knee mobility issues.

If you've ever thought about changing crank lengths, cost is probably the first thing that comes to mind - especially if you've got more than one bike. That's why we made the Test Fit Crank. Same geometry and aesthetic as the RGXC Titanium, just made from a solid block of 7075 aluminium. They're not light - but its a low-risk way to see how a short crank might improve ride quality, comfort and performance for you.

Product Type: Front - Superlight
Short Description: ASS SAVER MUDDER MINI Ft DETOUR
Web Description:
As the gravel segment expands, cyclists face new challenges. The issue of having dirt thrown in your face is a well known problem among mountain bikers. With huge clearances for 650B and 700c tyres in the front fork, gravel riders are now facing a similar issue.
"This one is a win for sure. ...it seems to outperform every other mini front fender I have tried." Cory Benson, Bikerumor
While mountain bikers are used to mud, gravel bikers face a different challenge. Anyone who has ridden on a wet gravel road is familiar with the mixture of fine sand and water that seems to be designed especially to seek and destroy bearings, not to mention what it does to your eyes on a long ride.
The MUDDER Mini is here to offer relief for your face and headset bearing. Simply mount it to your fork legs just above your front tyre and you will dramatically reduce the amount of spray in the critical areas. The MUDDER Mini attaches with innovative adjustable anti-slip straps to guarantee an instant and perfect fit on all fork sizes. Please make sure you have at least 8 mm side clearance between fork blade and tyre wall in order to safely fit the MUDDER Mini.

Product Type: Front - Superlight
Short Description: ASS SAVER MUDDER REG Ft DOT
Web Description:
The purpose of the MUDDER Regular is to keep your eyes muck-free as you go full speed down that dirtbag of a trail that you love so much. Chances are, that thanks to MUDDER, youre also not having flying mud for lunch.

In true Ass Savers spirit, weve taken the minimalist approach with some added clever thinking. The result is a fork-mounted front mudguard with an unobtrusive design and unsurpassed efficiency when it comes to keeping your face free from dirt. The design features innovative tyre-hugging deflectors that can be adjusted so virtually no mud will pass.

The front mudguard that will keep your feet happy! Mounts in seconds on basically any bike, regardless of frame size or cables. The long downward reach makes sure it's busy where it really counts.

Universal fit

The attachment of the SPEED MULLET is done in seconds with a single 2-in-1 velcro strap. Big fat carbon frame or thin steel frame doesn't matter. The design of the folds makes sure that the correct angle is achieved every time on every bike.

Cable management

What puts the SPEED MULLET above the rest is the cable routing feature. Utilising two shallow channels to let the cables pass between the frame and mudguard, it's compatible with the majority of existing cable combinations.

Use it anywhere

Whether you are dodging traffic in a wet downtown rush hour or grinding the endless gravel in the rain, the SPEED MULLET is your new haircut.

Product Type: Rear - Superlight
Short Description: ASS SAVER FENDOR BENDOR BIG DETOUR
Web Description:
The FENDOR BENDOR Big gets the dirty job done. The all new attachment makes fitting without tools a breeze, to virtually every bike in just a few seconds. 

Universal fit

With the newly developed attachment construction, FENDOR BENDOR Big is now completely self supported and therefore possible to mount on bikes without the sideway support of the seat stays or the support of a brake bridge. You could also mount it above your caliper brake to avoid interference with the brake.

It has been developed for gravel biking but is also a great protector for CX and MTB. With greater length and width, it's well suited for the longer wheelbase normally associated with this segment of bikes. A single midway fold still allows for convenient minimal storage but with maximum sturdiness for the rocky roads ahead.

Frame protection by 3M

Both models come with upgraded frame protection stickers from 3M. A material originally developed to protect the helicopter propeller blades from the sand storms in the desert, it makes sure that no scratches will be made to your beloved bike by the FENDOR BENDOR.

Web Description:
Challenging environments and heavy loads are no match for the uncompromising and award-winning Boost E. This compact and extremely sturdy Etility® bike is always ready for the next adventure  close to home or far from civilisation.

The rigid aluminium frame and big 24 x 2.6 custom tyres combine with the Bosch Performance Line CX Electric motor to provide a powerful yet composed ride. Capability meets versatility to make the Boost E the choice of professional rescue teams, adventurists, bike couriers and everyday suburban explorers.

The RemiDemi® breaks all the rules of how a bike is supposed to look and ride. We gave it small wheels and fat, grippy tyres for major manoeuvrability.

A thick, sturdy frame with a convenient low step-through. And an upright seating position atop a wide saddle that puts you in total control.

The RemiDemi loves to play, but it can also put in heavy work with a powerful Bosch mid-drive electric motor, Shimano Sora 9-speed and hydraulic disc brakes, and available accessories that give you countless clever ways to carry a child or loads of cargo.

Forged & CNC 6061-T6 Alloy, 31.8mm Bar Clamp
Web Description: All Box Delta stems are engineered and crafted using Oversized Technology. As we follow the load paths down the handlebars and have focused attention on the stem-to-bar interface. Since the Oversized handlebars have an increased wall thickness and tube diameter in this sector we have reciprocated with an augmented stem interface with greater surface area. By moving material from low-stress areas. This has greatly minimised twist and contributed to responsiveness. As the stem is mated with the handlebars we have contributed to increased pedalling stiffness by providing a backstop to the lifting phenomenon. There is no point pushing hard on your pedals if you cant pull up on your handlebars and deliver that power. Power can easily be lost to handlebar-to-stem deflection and the consequences can be poor power delivery and steering control. When combined with Boxs other Oversized components, youll experience heightened responsiveness and reduced latency.
Product Name: Box One Oversized 31.8 X 1-1/8" Delta Stem

Short Description: BOX ONE TOP LOAD STEM 31.8 48mm BLK
Web Description: All Box One top load stems are engineered and crafted using Oversized Technology. As we follow the load paths down the handlebars and have focused attention on the stem-to-bar interface. Since the Oversized handlebars have an increased wall thickness and tube diameter in this sector, we have reciprocated with an augmented stem interface with greater surface area. By moving material from low stress areas. This has greatly minimised twist and contributed to responsiveness. As the stem is mated with the handlebars, we have contributed to increased pedalling stiffness by providing a backstop to the lifting phenomenon. There is no point pushing hard on your pedals if you cant pull up on your handlebars and deliver that power. Power can easily be lost to handlebar-to-stem deflection and the consequences can be poor power delivery and steering control. When combined with Boxs other Oversized components, youll experience heightened responsiveness and reduced latency.
Product Name: Box One Oversized 31.8 X 1-1/8" Top Load Stem

Product Type: External Sealed Bearing, 68/73mm x 30mm
Web Description:
Several of the upper tier Box bottom brackets were engineered using Box Oversized Technology. These were developed in concert with the crank sets. We all know that there is no use pushing hard on your pedals if you cant deliver most of that power to the rear wheel. During the creation of our bottom brackets Box were obsessed with Power delivery / pedalling stiffness. To reduce lateral deflection, we chose to oversize the bottom bracket and therefore subsequently enlarged the spindle and the crank arms interfaces. This made room for larger bearing rings contributing to a vast increase in contact area. Box removed material from unloaded sections to reinforce the zones of high stress. Not only are you going to be more efficient with power delivery, but youll also feel the instant response of acceleration. Seen through another lens, less energy will be required to achieve the same elapsed time.
Key differences: The Box Two M30 bottom bracket is a slightly less acute embodiment of our Oversized technology seen in the M35. Generously sized ABEC-5 bearings help reduce power loss to defection. The larger 30mm cross section is designed to mate up with the rest of the M30 line of Oversized crank sets.

Web Description:
Several of the upper tier Box bottom brackets were engineered using our Oversized Technology. These were developed in concert with our crank sets. We all know that there is no use pushing hard on your pedals if you cant deliver most of that power to the rear wheel.

During the creation of our bottom brackets, we were obsessed with Power delivery, AKA pedaling stiffness. To reduce lateral deflection, we chose to oversize the bottom bracket and therefore subsequently enlarged the spindle and the crank arms interfaces. This made room for larger bearing rings, contributing to a vast increase in contact area. We robbed material from unloaded sections to reinforce the zones of high stress. Not only are you going to be more efficient with power delivery, but youll also feel the instant response of acceleration. Seen through another lens, less energy will be required to achieve the same elapsed time.

Key differences: The Box Two M35 bottom bracket takes the oversized effort to an extreme with a colossal 35mm diameter cross section courtesy ofPraxis. That dimension might seem massive, but weve also employed the use of Enduros burly but smooth gliding precision bearings to support that decision. Remember, youll need a modern frame to cope with this kind of technology.

The Box One V-Brake are the only brakes in the Box line-up to be blessed with Oversized Technology. They are also the only model to use sealed precision bearings to further reduce non-rotational movement. The 108mm long-reach brakes are excellent for BMX, mountain, city, urban and tandem bicycles using linear-pull-compatible levers. The 85-mm short reach (mini-V) brakes are an excellent choice for cyclocross or drop-bar gravel bikes.
Box have limited the use of our Oversized Technology to the V area since the levers need to be minimalist and largely act as a remote for the V-Brakes. To reduce lateral deflection at the V we chose to enlarge the pivot areas and arms while tightening tolerances at their interfaces. Box have robbed material from unloaded sections to reinforce these zones of high stress. Not only are you going to be more efficient with brake power delivery, but youll also feel the instant response of deceleration.

Box One Chain Tensioners are extruded then CNC-machined from 7075 aluminum for an optimal balance of strength and weight. A minimalist design adds style while reducing their overall mass. Laser-etched graphics include wheel position guides and two 10mm mounting holes with 15mm of adjustment to ensure perfect adjustability. Product Type: 104BCD, 4-bolt, Hollow Forged 7075-T6 Alloy, Alloy Spindle, inc. 30mm External BB set
Web Description: All Box One and Two cranksets are engineered and crafted using our Oversized Technology. we all know that there is no use pushing hard on your pedals if you cant deliver most of that power to the rear wheel. During the creation of our cranks, we were obsessed with Power delivery AKA pedalling stiffness. To reduce lateral deflection at the bottom bracket we chose to enlarge the spindle and the crank arms interfaces. We robbed material from unloaded sections to reinforce these zones of high stress. Not only are you going to be more efficient with power delivery, but youll also feel the instant response of acceleration. Seen through another lens, less energy will be required to achieve the same elapsed time

Product Type: 104BCD, Hollow Forged 7075-T6 Alloy, Alloy spindle, inc. 35mm PF30 BB set
Web Description: All Box One M35 cranksets are engineered and crafted using our Oversized Technology. we all know that there is no use pushing hard on your pedals if you cant deliver most of that power to the rear wheel. During the creation of our cranks, we were obsessed with Power delivery AKA pedalling stiffness. To reduce lateral deflection at the bottom bracket we chose to enlarge the spindle and the crank arms interfaces. We robbed material from unloaded sections to reinforce these zones of high stress. Not only are you going to be more efficient with power delivery, but youll also feel the instant response of acceleration. Seen through another lens, less energy will be required to achieve the same elapsed time.

Short Description: BOX ONE ALLOY BMX BAR 6.0" BLACK
Web Description: All Box ONE Alloy handlebars are engineered and crafted using our Oversized Technology. Handlebars have a dual purpose as they contribute to both steering and pedalling stiffness. By strategically varying wall thicknesses and tube diameters, we have moved material from 3 low stress areas to zones of high load. This has greatly minimised twist and contributed to responsiveness. Concurrently we have increased pedalling stiffness by providing a backstop to the 'lifting' phenomenon. There is no point pushing hard on your pedals if you cant pull up on your handlebars and deliver that power. Power can easily be lost to handlebar deflection and the consequences can lead to poor power delivery and steering control. When combined with Boxs other Oversized components, youll experience heightened responsiveness and reduced latency.
Product Name: Box One Alloy Triple Taper Handlebar

Web Description: All Box ONE Chromoly handlebars are engineered and crafted using our Oversized Technology. Handlebars have a dual purpose as they contribute to both steering and pedalling stiffness. By strategically varying wall thicknesses and tube diameters we have moved material from 3 low stress areas to zones of high load. This has greatly minimized twist and contributed to responsiveness. Concurrently we have increased pedalling stiffness by providing a backstop to the lifting phenomenon. There is no point pushing hard on your pedals if you cant pull up on your handlebars and deliver that power. Power can easily be lost to handlebar deflection and the consequences can lead to poor power delivery and steering control. When combined with Boxs other Oversized components, youll experience heightened responsiveness and reduced latency

Short Description: BOX HEXLAB Ti 31.8 BMX BAR 7D 6.5" NAT
Web Description:
All Box handlebars are engineered and crafted using our Oversized Technology. Handlebars have a dual purpose as they contribute to both steering and pedaling stiffness. By strategically varying wall thicknesses and tube diameters, we have moved material from 3 low-stress areas to zones of high load. This has greatly minimised twist and contributed to responsiveness. Concurrently we have increased pedaling stiffness by providing a backstop to the lifting phenomenon. There is no point pushing hard on your pedals if you cant pull up on your handlebars and deliver that power. Power can easily be lost to handlebar deflection and the consequences can lead to poor power delivery and steering control. Key differences: This particular model handlebar is tailored for larger-sized racers. Titanium allows us to explore the structural rigidity of steel but without the weight compromise. Carbon will contribute to a more aggressive steering response, while titanium will feel highly sensitive but more refined.

Product Type: Integrated type, IS42/28.6-IS52/30/40
Short Description: BOX ONE CARBON H/SET INT45 1/5 BLK
Web Description:
There is more to Box carbon headsets than their striking good looks. From top to bottom, the Box One Carbon Tapered Headset was designed to perform.
Each unit features a custom CNC-machined aluminium compression cap in the shape of the Box logo with cut-outs to reduce weight.
At the centre of the top cap is an anodized aluminium bolt that threads into a gold anodized aluminium expander plug. This expander eliminates the need for a star nut and works with all 1-1/8-inch steerer tubeseven carbon fiber steerer tubes.
The top bearing cover is crafted from carbon fiber, which adds style and shave weight.
At the heart of the headset are two super-smooth, titanium-nitride coated, sealed, 45×45 bearings. The titanium coating results in a low friction coefficient, increased corrosion resistance, and smoother rolling bearings.
A split crown race makes installation and removal from forks super easy. Box 1.5-inch headsets are intended for tapered frames and forks and include an adapter crown race that allows you to run a fork with a straight 1-1/8-inch steerer tube.
Product Name: Box One Oversized Carbon Tapered Headset

Product Type: 36H Rear Specific
Short Description: BOX HEX LAB CARBON RIM 20"36H Rr
Web Description: All Hex Lab rims are engineered to be front and rear specific and crafted using Oversized Technology. Box have carefully studied the load paths from the bars through the stem, headset, fork, axle, hub to the spokes and into the rim for steering stiffness. The same approach was taken via the pedals through the cranks and other components on the way to the rear rim for pedalling stiffness. That extra stiffness will net you more power to the ground out back, and upfront, you'll feel in control. When combined with Box's other Oversized components, you'll experience heightened responsiveness and reduced latency. Due to their compatibility with tubeless and tubed configurations, these rims have a broad range of tire options and setup possibilities, making them perfect for any track.

Short Description: BOX HEX LAB CARBON RIM 451 28H Rr
Web Description:

The Hex Lab Carbon BMX Rims are the only rims in the Box line-up to be blessed with Oversized Technology. They are also the only model to use Ultra High Modulus Carbon Fiber (stiffer than other carbons variants). Take notice of the unique Symmetrical Dihedral Angle Stabilizers. Yes, its a mouthful but each of those words carries meaning. The sculpted bullet-shaped spoke beds are designed to bridge the angle between the rim's angled flanks and the vertical plane. With that, we achieve the stability, stiffness, and durability of a much broader rim profile without actually taking on most of the extra material.

Product Type: Folding
Web Description: Box One 120 TPI Folding Tires were engineered with a minimalist approach to hit lofty goals for weight, traction, rolling resistance, and rebound. At its heart is a super-supple 120TPI casing where we forced in as much rubber displacing nylon as possible. Skin walls are employed to reduce drag and further reduce weight. We flanked the high-density casing with a tightly packed hoop of aramid fibres. Finally, we draped this all with BMX race-specific tread that transitions from a centre band with a large contact patch to unidirectional tactile knobbies on the sides. This aggressive combination allows for maximum traction out of the gate, immense adhesion in the corners, and low rolling resistance in the straights. A state-of-the-art mixture of compounds is used in various areas of the apex, wall, bead seat, and centre  with higher silica content in the tread to again remove more weight.

Finally, we draped this all with BMX race-specific tread that transitions from a centre band with a large contact patch to unidirectional tactile knobbies on the sides. This aggressive combination allows for maximum traction out of the gate, immense adhesion in the corners, and low rolling resistance in the straights. A state-of-the-art mixture of compounds is used in various areas of the apex, wall, bead seat, and centre  with higher silica content in the tread to again remove more weight.

The Box One chain is protected by a dual-coating. Starting with a Nickel plating which aids in corrosion resistance and then top it off with the "Diamond-Like Carbon" layer. The DLC is as fancy as it sounds; a synthetic diamond nano-coating that turns up the volume on hardness, wear-resistance, and slickness. All Prime 9 chains have chamfered shifting edges, solid plates and solid pins to safeguard durability. Our unique inner link spacing is engineered to grab those modern wide/narrow chainrings. Box have chosen to modernise the 9-speed platform due to the chain's spirited reputation.

Our Box One tier is for those of you who just aren't satisfied with anything but the BEST! You want the same kit that goes to Redbull Rampage every year, and why not? Everything about this package has been massaged for downhill duty. Your thumb will push a textured die-cast lever on a shifter that's had its clamp whittled away by our CNC machines. Product Type: 3-finger levers - Reach adjustment - BRS Return spring
Web Description:
High performance aluminium MTB type brake lever with high power cable pull - suitable for many types of cable brakes, including Disc brakes, side pull calipers and cantilevers.

Features
- Strong and light aluminium material.
- High power cable pull ratio for canti, caliper and disc brakes.
- Powerful MTB type 3 finger lever handle
- Lever reach adjustable with 2mm adjuster.
- BRS return spring aids cable return.

- Cold forged aluminium handle.
- Cable Pull 18mm for cantis, caliper and some Discs.
- Colours: Black clamp with polished Silver handle.
- Weight: 160g pair

Web Description:
The EXA Form Jag-I is a reliable, value-focused dropper seatpost designed for riders who want modern dropper functionality in frames requiring a 27.2 mm seatpost diameter.

With 120 mm of smooth, controlled travel, the Jag-I allows riders to quickly lower the saddle for descents and technical sections, then return to full pedalling height at the touch of a lever. Its proven internal mechanism delivers consistent performance for trail and mountain riding, making it an ideal upgrade for bikes not compatible with larger-diameter droppers.

Constructed from durable aluminium and supplied with a handlebar-mounted remote, the Jag-I offers dependable performance at an accessible price point  perfect for trail, hardtail, and older MTB frames.

Web Description:
Eliminate rattle on bicycles with internal cable routing. 
Many frames use internal cable routing for aesthetics and to improve aerodynamics. In some cases, internal cabling/hoses causes unwanted rattling sounds when riding over rough surfaces.
This sheath fits around your brake cable/hose or gear cable and dampens any unwanted and annoying sounds. The foam rubber tubing prevents your cables from making noise inside the frame.

Product Type: Forged Alloy with M5 Mudguard mount - 2 SS Adjusting Bolts & locknuts.
Web Description:
Our clever tensioners with integrated M5 mudguard mounting points. 

The simplicity of a horizontal dropout and low maintenance of fixed wheel or single speed is great, but it does have it issues when it comes to mounting mudguards. We designed these smart little gadgets to enable people with track dropouts to use mudguards. This classic 2 bolt chain tensioner means you can get the correct tension on your chain and then when the winter wet weather comes in, it makes it easy to fit mudguards with the M5 threaded hole built into the tensioner. A simple and function design with a hard wearing anodised black finish.

Lightweight forged Alloy with M5 Mudguard mount and twin Stainless Steel adjusting bolts & locknuts.
2 SS Adjusting
Bolts & locknuts

Product Type: Forged alloy 110BCD, Sq Taper, Inc. 50/34T Alloy rings
Web Description:
A modern classic. All the retro appeal of a fluted classic look chainset with modern benefits. Ideal for use with 9 speed chains, update your old chainset or replace it without losing that classic look. Complete with 50/34t chainrings its the ideal chainset for someone looking to update their bike with something a little friendlier to the legs when hitting the hills. 

Forged Aluminium cranks means this not only looks great but is also light weight. It uses a classic square taper bottom bracket, keeping things in line with the traditionalist aesthetics of classic bikes.  Keeping it classic these are available in a crank arm length of 172.5mm.

Note - For those looking for a more traditional and larger gearing we also offer the Heritage Chainset (CKGEHD7S) that comes in a 130bcd - 53/39T chainring option.

Product Type: 10mm Rise, 4Deg Flare, 125mm drop, 75mm reach, 6061 T6 Alloy, 31.8mm
Web Description:
Genetic Driser 4-10 handlebars bring another level of comfort and control for drop bar users.

These shallow drop-riser handlebars have a 10mm rise which enables riders to achieve a slightly higher overall front-end position along with 4 degrees of flare, giving a slightly wider stance when riding in the drops.

The Driser 4-10 provides added control and wrist comfort whilst the ergonomic semi-aero top section provides a comfortable cruising grip area.

Made from 6061 series Aluminium alloy for superior strength and toughness, whilst also being lightweight, with good fatigue resistance.

Available in five different widths from 400 to 480mm to suit most sizes of rider.

Driser 4-10 handlebars are a perfect choice for Road, Cyclo Cross, Gravel, Touring and Commuter riding.

Product Type: 20mm Rise, 4Deg Flare, 125mm drop, 75mm reach, 6061 T6 Alloy, 31.8mm
Web Description:
Our Driser 4 handlebars have been designed to give riders another great handlebar option.

These bars are made from 6061 series Aluminium alloy for superior strength and toughness, whilst also being lightweight, with good fatigue resistance.

The 20mm rise enables riders to achieve a higher front end position, whilst also providing additional compliance and therefore comfort, compared to standard flat topped bars.

The 4 degrees of flare, gives an extra 17mm bar width when riding on the drops, the Driser 4 provides added control and wrist comfort. 

Available in four different widths from 380 to 440mm to suit most sizes of rider. 

Driser handlebars are a perfect choice for Road, Cyclo Cross, Gravel, Touring and Commuter riding.

Product Type: Modern Sportive style, 125mm Drop, Reach 70mm, 6061 Alloy, 31.8mm
Web Description:
Our STV handlebars are a great product at a great price point.

These bars are made from 6061 series Aluminium alloy, for superior strength and toughness, whilst also being lightweight, with good fatigue resistance.

With 70mm of reach and 20mm drop, the STV bars also feature a flat transition from the bar tops to the brake lever hoods. While the five different size options from 360 to 440mm, in 20mm increments, make them the perfect choice for riders, trying to achieve optimal handlebar width.

STV bars are aimed at the road rider/racer, but are also suitable for Track, Cyclo Cross, Gravel, Touring and Commuter bikes.

Product Type: Double Sided Cliples/Flat Pedals - Sealed Bearing, Inc Cleats
Web Description:
Dual-sided SPD type clipless/cage pedals 

The Switch Pedal offers the option for use with clipless style cycling shoes or regular flat shoes. This makes these pedals ideal for sport or day to day riding.  

Genetic Switch pedals are balanced so that the regular alloy cage face will usually present itself first, making a quick get-away problem-free with or without clipless footwear. It can then easily be flipped over once riding to gain the full benefits of a clipless system. 

Clipless pedal systems require specific clipless compatible' shoes to be worn that accept the pedal cleats into the soles, many types of shoes are available from bicycle shops. 

The Genetic Switch uses the popular SPD-compatible clipless cleat system with a knee joint-friendly 4 degrees of lateral float when clipped in. 

The clipless system also includes an adjustable tension foot release, enabling the user to set the correct tension for their needs.  

Shoe cleats and optional safety reflectors are included.

Product Type: 35mm Clamp, 6061 CNC Alloy Stem. 32mm length, 0 deg. Rise
Web Description:
The new Gusset TS stem was developed with a desire to bring a sleek, stiff, up-to-date, confidence inspiring stem to the market at an accessible price point. Developed using CAD and 3D printing technology, with input from professional athletes, the TS stem went through various iterations before the design was finalised.

The stem features an innovative faceplate with a Stiff Upper Lip connecting piece, helping to locate the faceplate into the stem body and increase stiffness. This results in accurate steering and uncompromised feedback through the bar, whilst keeping the open look of a modern stem.

Machined from forged 6061 Aluminium and using Cr-Mo bolts, the TS stem is constructed using the best quality materials for robust mountain bike riding.

Product Type: Alloy Spacer kit for XD type freehub body inc Steel 16T Cog
Web Description:
The XD 1-ER has been developed from our vision that riders with XD freehubs may want to go single speed without buying a new freehub. We entered the single speed market early and we know that riders still look for simple and elegant solutions to keep their bikes working in all conditions.
Utilising the splines and threaded XD freehub body our XD 1-ER kit is simple to fit and provides a 49 or 51mm chain line depending on the orientation of the suppled 3mm spacer. Going singlespeed on a modern SRAM equipped bike has never been so easy. 

This kit is supplied with:
- 16t 5/64" sprocket
- Steel Splined Flat Sided Spacer 
- Threaded Sprocket Carrier
- 3mm Spacer
- 6x T25 Torx bolts
-SRAM XD compatible only.

17/18/19/20/22T cogs available separately

Web Description:
With design cues from today's high end, cutting edge bike designs. The S2 AM is our best looking saddle to date, with unique, premium features designed around today's rider.

We've invested in a custom foam base for a unique look and to provide extra pressure relief on long rides. As riders we also ride in the rain a lot, so we also added new rubber Anti-slide grip points under your sit bones to improve wet weather performance.

Features:

- Unique staple-less, hardwearing fabric top with custom rubber grip points
- Custom shaped foam padding with relief channel for extra comfort
- Built in shock absorption through the saddle base and rails

Product Type: Matt Jones Signature MTB Saddle, Custom Foam Base, Staple-less Black PU cover with added grip, Chrom
Short Description: GUSSET S2 AM SADDLE MATT J SIG
Web Description:
Following the Launch of the Matt Jones Signature Pivotal Saddle, we have now taken our S2 AM saddle and added Matt's own Signature colourway.

The S2 AM is our most versatile saddle with unique, premium features designed around the modern trail rider.

Constructed from a custom foam base for a unique look while providing extra pressure relief on long rides. Rubber Anti-slide grip points under your sit bones improve wet weather performance.

The AM saddle uses a conventional twin-railed chassis so that it can easily be used with all standard type seatpost, including Dropper posts.

Product Type: Freeride/DH Saddle, PU cover with added grip. Chromo rails
Web Description:
Taking design cues from the popular Pivotal DJ saddle we introduce our all-new S2 FR Saddle.

This development further enhances the S2 saddle range. This saddle will be at home, not only on Freeride bikes but also Slopestyle, Downhill and Dirt Jump rigs where you would prefer to run a railed saddle.

Featuring the unique rubber Antislide grip points from the S2 AM saddle and applying them to the nose of the saddle, it provides extra grip when throwing bar spins or Superman seat grabs.

Product Type: Junior/DH Saddle, PU cover with added grip. Chromo rails
Web Description:

Features
Smaller overall length and width for junior riders
Unique hardwearing fabric top with custom rubber grip points

Product Type: Stealth Pivotal Fit, PU Cover with added nose grip
Short Description: GUSSET S2 DJ PIV SADDLE BLACK
Web Description:
Designed in conjunction with our factory rider Matt Jones, we took the new look and feel of our S2 AM and put them into our best ever pivotal dirt jump/slopestyle saddle. Featuring Pivotal stealth technology that tightens through the seatpost and taking the unique rubber Anti-slide grip points from the S2 AM saddle and applying them to the nose of the saddle, it provides extra grip when throwing barspins or grabbing it for superman seat grabs. From one of the best riders in the world, to your bike.

Features:

- Subtle design with hardwearing fabric top
- Custom rubber Anti-slide grip points on nose
- Pivotal Stealth fitment

Please note: a long T handle 5mm hex wrench is required to fit this saddle to a pivotal seatpost.

Product Type: Single Ply, Classic super soft ribbed profile - inc Push-in End Plugs
Web Description:
Noun: Sleeper; Plural Noun: Sleepers
An object that appears normal on the outside but performs far beyond expectations; this is not just another ribbed grip.
Taking what we knew about the classic ribbed pattern grip we looked on how to improve it: using the best available premium materials we made the grip soft for better feel, hold and shock absorption. From extensive testing and experience we have developed this super-soft flanged grip to be 147mm long and 30mm in diameter, with a choice of 9 colours.

Product Type: Matt Jones Signature - Single Ply, Classic super soft ribbed profile - inc Push-in End Plugs
Short Description: GUSSET SLEEPER FL GRIPS GRY MARB
Web Description:
Watching Matt ride at his compound or his local trails, you soon realise that he needs to be able to put trust into his bikes contact points. With this in mind, we worked closely with Matt to develop a Sleeper grip for him.

Matt opted for a softer grip for better feel, hold on the bars and shock absorption. This super-soft, flanged grip is 147mm long, 30mm in diameter and comes in a grey marble colourway, not only complimenting his bikes but many others.

After extensive testing and feedback, we present the Sleeper MJ Grip.

Product Type: Single Ply VEXK, Single Clamp-On type, Custom Profile with Closed end
Short Description: GUSSET S2 LOCK ON GRIPS BLU
Web Description:
The grip of your dreams! 

Utilising different size diamond knurling top and bottom, and eccentric core to give more padding on the topside and under your palm, ribbed underside for finger grip, as well as a dedicated thumb grip area when you're gripping tight and pulling back. We also added extra security ribs on top to stop your hands blowing off the end of the bars when you're sending it deep.

We've spent a long time perfecting what we believe is the perfect grip. Featuring a long list of ideas from everyone here - and we're riders after all - you're gonna love the new S2 grip.

Product Type: Single Ply VEXK, Single Clamp-On type, Knurled Profile with Closed end
Short Description: GUSSET SINGLE FILE LOCK GRIPS BLU
Web Description:
Single File Lock on Grips

Our old faithful File Lock grip gets a face lift! 

The Single File uses a single alloy clamp on the inside to give you more space for your hands on the outside of the bar. This gives you more comfort and ultimately more control with more usable width on your bar.

Features:
File pattern grip for all weather performance
Tapered core with closed rubber end for precise fit and comfort
Alloy single clamp design with 3mm hex key
133mm length and 30mm diameter
25A VEXK Compound for traction and durability
Available in 8 colours.

1.37"x 24T Standard R/H threaded.

Product Type: Front BMX. Sealed Bearing. 100mmx3/8" Bolt-in Axle with alloy covers.
Short Description: HALO MXF BMX Ft HUB 32H BLK
Web Description:
At a mere 155g the MXR Front Hub is a superlight race hub and yet strong enough for freestyle.
 
Smooth sealed bearing alloy front hub with wide spaced flanges for high strength, high triangulation wheel builds. 
The forged alloy body and 15mm hollow alloy axle optimise weight and strength, while minimising flex. 

There are two stock bolt configurations: 
28H or 32H for Race (with alloy capped Cr-Mo Allen bolts), 
36H for Dirt/Street/Park (with Cr-Mo Hex bolts)
(note: the 2 bolt options can be purchased and interchanged if using pegs we recommend the Cro-Mo Hex bolts).
 
>Forged and CNC'd alloy body with Mid height flanges.
>Lightweight, rigid hollow 15mm Alloy axle.
>2 sealed cartridge bearings.
>Wide spoke triangulation for a stronger wheel.

Weight : 155g (exc. bolts)
28H Red anodised.
32H Black or Red anodised.
36H Black, Red, Blue or Silver anodised.

Hub Dimensions:
C-L and C-R both 32mm flange dia 45mm.

Product Type: Rr SB. 135x10mm bolt-in (14mm adaptors inc.) IS Disc.  Cog NOT included
Short Description: HALO DJD SDV SS Rr HUB 32H BLK
Web Description:
If dirt jumping is your thing, then so are our DJ series of hubs.

After years of the highest profile testing from our world famous dirt jump team, our current range of DJ hubs are our best yet.

Huge strength to weight ratios sets our DJ series apart from the crowd.

Our DJD Supadrive hub offers a 120 point near instant engagement, with the ability to withstand substantial torque loads. Supadrive is our most advanced and reliable drive system to date.

The DJD Supadrive hub is built around a bushed driver which reduces weight and improves durability over cartridge bearings especially when using compact cog sizes.

Wide spoke flanges helps the DJD Supadrive hub build into uncompromisingly stiff wheel, whilst sealed bearings help ensure longevity.

- Hollow alloy axle with 6mm central hex to remove bolt in fixings without the axle spinning.
- Cr-Mo M10 Bolt-in fixings.
- 14mm adaptors included: the large surface faces of the cones allow us to also use 10-14mm adaptor washers, making this hub suitable for 10mm or 14mm dropouts.
- 2 sealed main body bearings and 1 hardened DU driver bush.
- 11T x 1/8? sprocket fitted standard.
- 9, 10, 11, 13, 14 and 16 tooth sprockets also available.

Product Type: Rr SB 3 Pawl. 135x10mm bolt-in (14mm adaptors inc.) IS Disc. Cog NOT included
Short Description: HALO DJD BD SS Rr HUB 32H BLK
Web Description:
Bushed DJD Rear hub

Halo's DJD BD hubs have become the DJ Disc Single Speed hub of choice for many riders. 

BD hubs have been utilised successfully in the hardcore BMX market for quite a while, and the advantages of their lighter weight and improved durability over cartridge bearings are pretty well proven, especially when using compact cog sizes.
The stresses caused in a Single Speed hub can be huge and, a bush spreads the loads involved over a much larger surface area than ball bearings can achieve, and therefore helps to avoid premature bearing failure.

In addition to the BD features, we have fitted a lightweight alloy axle with tough, replaceable, M10 "Bolt-in" Cr-Mo fixings and alloy caps. We also know that bolt-in fittings can be tricky if the axle starts to spin when turning the bolt, (as you have nothing to hold) - so we have also added a 6mm Hex broach deep inside the axle - just in case the axle starts to spin when you don't want it to !

14mm adaptors included: the large surface faces of the "cones" allow us to also use 10-14mm adaptor washers - making this hub suitable for 10mm or 14mm dropouts.
Forged & CNC finished body with slotted flanges.
Bush Driver with screw-on 11T cog.
Hollow Alloy axle with 6mm central hex.
Cr-Mo M10 Bolt-in fixings.
14mm adaptors included.

Super strong lightweight alloy axle.
2 sealed main body bearings and 1 hardened plastic driver bush.
3 double wide pawls ensure positive drive.
30 points of engagement.
Lightweight forged CNC finished alloy hub shell.
11T x 1/8" drivers cog fitted standard. (One piece 9t Driver and 10,11,13,14,16t cogs also available).

135mm O.L.D.
32, 36 or 48H 

Weight; 
436g inc adaptors & bolts.

Tech;
Flange diameter : 58mm
Flange C - L : 33mm
Flange C - R : 36mm

Options;
As Standard: Alloy Internal Female axle system with replaceable M10 bolts to fit 10mm dropouts.
14mm adaptors included to fit 14mm dropouts.
12mm through-axle option - aftermarket upgrade.

6D - Halo 6 Drive System:
The ultra-dependable 6-Drive system: Smooth, quiet and reliable power transfer.

6 reversed pawls, all independently sprung and featuring double tips, giving 12 point simultaneous engagement on a 30 click Cr-Mo drive ring powering the optional Cr-Mo or 7075 hard alloy splined freehub body. This results in an extremely positive and reliable drive system.

The uncluttered freehub that a reversed pawl system provides, allows a cartridge bearing to be used directly under the freehub drive ring (rather than an offset position that is commonly used in conventional pawl systems that cram the pawl mechanism into the relatively small diameter of the freehub itself.)
The resultant reduction in offset torque transfer from the freehub reduces leverage effect on the axle and ultimately increases bearing durability.

Halo Wheels, renowned for its deep roots in the dirt jump and slopestyle scene, has worked alongside world champions and legends of the sport to craft the best wheels possible. Leveraging extensive feedback from riders and consumers, weve developed an innovative drive system designed for higher engagement, reliability, and performance across all types of riding. 

The Mantradrive 750 hubset features a standard 15 x 110 front hub and a Halo first Boost MTSS 12 x 148mm rear hub. Aimed at the emerging Slopeduro market and single-speed conversions. Features a 72mm flange-to-centre width for unmatched wheel strength and perfectly balanced tension. Compatible with Pinion gearboxes for ultimate versatility.

The MantraDrive750 system redefines performance. 

features: 
	150 Points of Engagement: Utilising a leaf spring mechanism Mantra 750  drive uses 5 pawls on a 150 point engagement drive-ring (5 x 150 = 750) the system delivers near-instant engagement with 2.4 degrees of rotation. 

	Durability Under High Torque: Built to withstand the stresses of high-torque applications using CNC machined Cr-mo axle and freehub. 

	Enhanced Load Distribution: By incorporating 7 engagement teeth per pawl instead of the conventional single tooth, the system spreads load more evenly, increasing longevity and reducing maintenance. 

	Cr-Mo Freehubs: All freehubs are made from chromoly (Cr-Mo) for superior durability, reduced cassette bite on HG-splined cassettes, and compatibility with single-speed setups. Internally weight-relieved, they achieve both strength and lightweight. 

	6902 Bearings: The integrated Cro-Mo freehub and driver allow more useable space for the bearings. This enables substantial 6902 sealed bearings to be used in the freehub for improved durability and easier servicing worldwide.

Note- The Mini HG freehub measures 26mm.

Product Type: Alloy ends, Cr-Mo shafts, Hex tool fitting (included) - 156mm Rod
Short Description: HALO SECURE QR STD Ft BLACK
Web Description:
There's nothing to make stealing an unlocked wheel quicker and easier than conventional quick release skewers, as no tools are required. Even Hex bolt skewers have a downfall when it comes to security, as all that stands between them and your wheels is an Allen key.

Our Anti-Theft Skewers add an extra level of protection from any thief looking to steal your unlocked wheel, as they will need an Allen key with a hole in the centre to accept the additional security pin.  

Halo Anti-Theft Skewers includes a Hex pin tool for your home tool box, and weve added a security hex pin tool onto a handy anodised alloy key ring fob, which also includes a bottle opener.

Skewers are available in 3 types:
Front Standard (156mm rod)
Fits:

Standard QR type hub with 5mm internal skewer clearance.
Over Locknut Dimension of 100mm.
Dropouts up to 8mm thick.
Rear Road Standard (188mm rod)
Fits:

Standard Road QR type hub with 5mm internal skewer clearance.
Over Locknut Dimension of 130mm.
Dropouts up to 9mm thick.
Rear MTB standard or XL Road (192mm rod)
Fits:

Standard MTB QR type hub with 5mm internal skewer clearance.
Over Locknut Dimension of 135mm.
Dropouts up to 8.5mm thick.
Or

XL Road QR type hub with 5mm internal skewer clearance.
Over Locknut Dimension of 130mm.
Dropouts up to 11mm thick.

Our RD2 series of hubs have been designed ground up for the highest performance road disc brake applications.

Product Type: 130-135mm Rear Disc Adaptor kit - 2.5mm Symmetrical
Web Description:
Adapter kits to change Halo 6D Road Rear Disc hubs from 130mm OLD to 135mm OLD.

Option A. Use to fit a 135mm Disc frame with standard 130mm spaced cranks.
(Fits most crankset spacings).
*	Select the required Freehub option.
*	Select your choice of suitable disc only or universal rim.
*	Select the +2.5mm symmetrical adaptor kit. (LH 2.5mm and RH 2.5mm cones).  
*	Mount the adapter with XL bolts (supplied).
*	Mount an IS disc rotor.

Option B. Use to fit a 135mm Disc frame with 135mm specific spaced cranks.
(Use with SRAM road 135mm cranksets with 2.5mm off-set).
*	Select the required Freehub option.
*	Select your choice of suitable disc only or universal rim.
*	Select the +5mm asymmetrical adaptor kit. (LH 1 x 5mm cone, RH use Std cone)*.
*	Mount the adapter with XL bolts (supplied).
*	Mount an IS disc rotor.
Note:: this option requires the wheel to be re-dished 2.5mm towards the none drive side to ensure more equalised spoke tension


Note:
In some circumstances, if using an MTB specific 10spd cassette in conjunction with a 135mm frame and a 130mm crank set-up (using the 2.5mm symmetric adaptor set) it is possible that you may  encounter running difficulties in large sprocket to large chainwheel.  This is due to a difference in cassette offset between Shimano MTB and Road 10spd sprockets. Fitting a Road-specific cassette will often solve the issue, or alternatively, switch to the asymmetric +5mm adaptor set and re-dish the wheel.

Product Type: Rear - Forged/CNC alloy. Sealed bearing, Fixed/HG Spline,
Web Description:
An ever present headache with traditional fixed hubs is the assembly of a drive sprocket that is attached by a thread being pulled in both directions by the pedal torque. The usual solution to avoiding the sprocket unwinding itself from the hub is a left-hand threaded lock-ring, butted up tight against the sprocket. But, as many riders have found out, this system can be quite volatile.

We thought, there has to be a better way...

...and the solution - an HG splined hub body, with sprockets that slide on and an independent lockring that never has to handle rotational forces from the drive.

Halo Fix-G advantages:
Easy and secure fixing and servicing.
Adjustable chainline - 41 to 52mm.
Accepts 12 - 20T sprockets.
No need for chainwhip tools.

Note: The HG spline must ONLY be used with 7mm wide "fat foot" sprockets such as Halo Fat Foot sprockets or Gusset Double Six sprocket to avoid the cog biting into the alloy splines on the hub. Regular width HG sprockets should NEVER be used.

"Halo's HG spline system is so obvious and brilliant that other brands must be kicking themselves for not thinking of it first. It can't slip or thread; it's way easier to fit/swap and will take down to 12t cogs, it's genius".
Ty at the Footdown (www.thefootdown.co.uk). Oct 2011
Click on the reviews button for the full review.

"The Fix-g hub is great! it runs smoothly as the previous Halo hub but the fact that you can move the sprocket for a perfect chainline is great and you can feel the difference straight away. Also, it's really easy to do, everyone can do it without a mechanic's help, I think you should advertise this and make it clear for everyone, people don't have to be scared of a new technology..."
Ivan Fiorilla... 5th Floor riding club - London. 
The5thfloor.co.uk

Product Type: Rear - Forged/CNC alloy. Sealed bearing, Fixed/HG Spline,
Web Description:
An ever present headache with traditional fixed hubs is the assembly of a drive sprocket that is attached by a thread being pulled in both directions by the pedal torque. The usual solution to avoiding the sprocket unwinding itself from the hub is a left-hand threaded lock-ring, butted up tight against the sprocket. But, as many riders have found out, this system can be quite volatile.

We thought, there has to be a better way...

...and the solution - an HG splined hub body, with sprockets that slide on and an independent lockring that never has to handle rotational forces from the drive.

Halo Fix-G advantages:
Easy and secure fixing and servicing.
Adjustable chainline - 41 to 52mm.
Accepts 12 - 20T sprockets.
No need for chainwhip tools.

Note: The HG spline must ONLY be used with 7mm wide "fat foot" sprockets such as Halo Fat Foot sprockets or Gusset Double Six sprocket to avoid the cog biting into the alloy splines on the hub. Regular width HG sprockets should NEVER be used.

"Halo's HG spline system is so obvious and brilliant that other brands must be kicking themselves for not thinking of it first. It can't slip or thread; it's way easier to fit/swap and will take down to 12t cogs, it's genius".
Ty at the Footdown (www.thefootdown.co.uk). Oct 2011
Click on the reviews button for the full review.

"The Fix-g hub is great! it runs smoothly as the previous Halo hub but the fact that you can move the sprocket for a perfect chainline is great and you can feel the difference straight away. Also, it's really easy to do, everyone can do it without a mechanic's help, I think you should advertise this and make it clear for everyone, people don't have to be scared of a new technology..."
Ivan Fiorilla... 5th Floor riding club - London. 
The5thfloor.co.uk

Product Type: CNC 6061 alloy spacers. 2 pces 12/19mm x 5mm
Web Description:
These simple, 5mm lightweight aluminium spacers are designed to fit onto Thru-type hub axles to enable regular 100mm spaced hubs to fit into 110mm (Boost) type spaced fork thru-axle dropouts. (1 x 5mm spacer added each side = 10mm)
 
 
Please Note: 
These axle spacers do not change the disc brake rotor alignment position of the hub. 
Please consult with your dealer if you are considering these to adapt a regular Disc Brake hub to fit with a Boost system fork.  
 
Alternative adaptor kits that include Boost Disc Rotor spacers are available for the Halo MT hub.  
Please see: MT Front Boost Disc Adaptor  (item code: HUHAZM6FBK)

Product Type: 142-148mm Rear Disc Adaptor kit - 6mm asymetric
Short Description: HALO MT SDV BOOST DISC ADAPT 6mm
Web Description:
Our MT Supadrive Boost Disc Adaptor kit turns your standard MT Supadrive rear hub (142mm) into a Boost compatible configuration (148mm).

The kit consists of:

A disc side specific extension end cone

A 6mm interlocking disc rotor spacer

Extra-long disc rotor bolts

Please note that this kit is designed to work with our new generation threaded cr-mo axle (HXHASVTMHG for HG type, HXHASVTMXD for XD type).  Our new generation threaded cr-mo axle is retro-fittable to older generation MT Supadrive hubs.

Additionally, once this kit has been fitted the wheel rim will need to be re-dished by a wheel builder by 3mm to be central.

Product Type: Rr. HG type - Inc Internal axle, 142 and 135QR ends - HG Fit
Web Description:
Replacement axles and axle spares for the Halo MT Supadrive hub.

The Halo MT hub can be run as a QR 9x135mm set up or 12 x142mm through axle.

Utilising heat treated Cro-mo Steel the MT Supadrive axle reduces flex and increases power transfer, and is available in Shimano HG or Sram XD variations (to match your applicable cassette).

Product Type: 33mm wide (27.6mm internal) Offset disc alloy rim. Disc ONLY with SS eyelets. ERD 597mm
Web Description:
The Gravitas has been specially designed and tested for the demanding conditions of the Downhill world cup circuit and the most extreme Enduro races in the series. Aiming to provide riders with the confidence to tackle any challenging descent. 
A unique design feature of the Gravitas is the honed 27.5mm internal width (33mm external). This width allows for larger sidewall support for the tyres, which is beneficial for maintaining stability and preventing tyre roll during aggressive riding. Despite a reasonably wide internal width, the Gravitas has been designed to remain narrow enough to minimise unnecessary collisions with rocks and other obstacles on the trail. 
Utilising an asymmetric design that has been tried and tested to deliver optimal performance. This design approach allows for a wheel package that excels in descents while minimising unnecessary bulk in areas where it is not needed. To address the differences in wall length and strength resulting from the asymmetric design, the wall thicknesses of the Gravitas wheels have been proportioned accordingly. This ensures that impact forces are balanced out equally, contributing to the overall durability and performance of the wheels.
The Gravitas offers an incredible package for a 575g rim (27.5), without compromising on strength and durability. They have been specially engineered to excel on the roughest terrain, providing riders with the confidence to tackle anything in their way.

This width allows for larger sidewall support for the tyres, which is beneficial for maintaining stability and preventing tyre roll during aggressive riding. Despite a reasonably wide internal width, the Gravitas has been designed to remain narrow enough to minimise unnecessary collisions with rocks and other obstacles on the trail. 
Utilising an asymmetric design that has been tried and tested to deliver optimal performance. This design approach allows for a wheel package that excels in descents while minimising unnecessary bulk in areas where it is not needed. To address the differences in wall length and strength resulting from the asymmetric design, the wall thicknesses of the Gravitas wheels have been proportioned accordingly. This ensures that impact forces are balanced out equally, contributing to the overall durability and performance of the wheels.
The Gravitas offers an incredible package for a 575g rim (27.5), without compromising on strength and durability. They have been specially engineered to excel on the roughest terrain, providing riders with the confidence to tackle anything in their way.

Product Type: MTB 30mm Internal/37mm External, Welded 6069 Alloy, Welded Joint, Disc ONLY with eyelets, ERD 484
Web Description:
The Skelta rim has been developed by riders, we created the rim to offer as much durability and performance as possible, with a 30mm internal optimised for tyre support and confidence inspiring riding.

Using a invisible welded joint and shot peened 6069 T6 heat-treated Aluminium, it is made to last without compromising on weight or style. We added stainless eyelets for extra strength.

Featuring a shot-peened surface which provides increased corrosion and fatigue resistance, as well as a uniform matt finish.

Product Type: BSX double wall 36mm Anodised with Double SS eyelets,ERD 386
Web Description:
Our SAS rim needs no introduction and has a proven record for re-defining what strength is.

Utilising T-10 heat treated alloy the SAS rim is the go to option for anyone who is looking for a reliable and sturdy all use mountain bike rim.

The anodised versions of our SAS rims can also be used with rim brakes. Naturally, the anodised finish will wear and reveal the silver coloured aluminium.

As the braking surface is not CNC finished, there is a bedding in period.

Please note the SAS rim is not tubeless compatible.

Product Type: 27mm deep, Anodised CNC brake surface, ERD 585mm
Web Description:
Aerotrack Rim
A slightly deeper section sister product to the well established Aerorage.
The Aerotrack is a great option for those chasing after a light, strong road/track rim with an all-over colour finish (i.e. without a machined finish braking surface.)
A perfect choice for those riders who want a super clean aero rim and no rim brakes.

Note: Anodised colour Aerotrack rims can also be used with a rim brake, as the braking surface is machined before colouring. However the colour will - of course wear.

NOTE: Rim brakes should NOT be used on the Paint and Powder coated colour finishes. If a coloured rim brake option is required, we would recommend the Aerorage rim featuring it's machine finished brake surface.

Specifications:
19mm width.
27mm Aero profile.
"All over" colour finish (no brake surface).
Strong Box section double wall.
T-10 heat treated alloy.
Reliable, weld free, sleeve joint.

700c Road/Track 
32 H.

Weight guides; 435

E.R.D.; 585

Recommended Spoke Tensions:
Front: 80 to 100Kgs. Rear: 100 to 135Kgs.

Aerotrack Rim
A slightly deeper section sister product to the well established Aerorage.
The Aerotrack is a great option for those chasing after a light, strong road/track rim with an all-over colour finish (i.e. without a machined finish braking surface.)
A perfect choice for those riders who want a super clean aero rim and no rim brakes.

Note: Anodised colour Aerotrack rims can also be used with a rim brake, as the braking surface is machined before colouring. However the colour will - of course wear.

NOTE: Rim brakes should NOT be used on the Paint and Powder coated colour finishes. If a coloured rim brake option is required, we would recommend the Aerorage rim featuring it's machine finished brake surface.

Specifications:
19mm width.
27mm Aero profile.
"All over" colour finish (no brake surface).
Strong Box section double wall.
T-10 heat treated alloy.
Reliable, weld free, sleeve joint.

700c Road/Track 
32 H.

Weight guides; 435

E.R.D.; 585

Recommended Spoke Tensions:
Front: 80 to 100Kgs. Rear: 100 to 135Kgs.

Product Type: Double Wall Road/City 24mm Anodised with SS Eyelets, ERD 541
Web Description:
White Line 26
26" version of Halo's high quality, general purpose rim.

The double wall box section provides huge strength, whilst the relatively low-profile shape provides a degree of vertical compliance comfort. 
Stainless steel spoke eyelets help ensure an evenly tensioned wheel.
An excellent choice for those looking for strength and reliability over weight saving.
Ideal for City, Trekking and Touring. 

features:
24mm width.
Comfort enhancing low profile.
Stainless Steel spoke eyelets.
Strong Box section double wall.
T-10 heat treated alloy.
Reliable, weld free, pin joint.

36H or 32H.
Available in Silver or Black anodised. 

Recommended Spoke Tensions:
Non Disc wheels: Front: 80 to 100Kgs. Rear: 100 to 135Kgs.
Disc brake wheels: Front and Rear: 100 to 135Kgs.

Web Description:

Product Type: HD Tyre Insert for Enduro / DH. Includes  44mm Valve - Suit 27.5" x 2.4"-2.6" Tyres
Web Description:
Looking to squeeze the most performance out of your mountain bike tyres? Look no further than the Rimpact Pro V2 tyre insert. Crafted from dual-density closed-cell foam, the Rimpact Pro V2 provides incredible durability and resilience against the toughest terrain. Say goodbye to regular pinch flats, punctures, and tyre tears with the Pro V2's impact-absorbing properties, which not only help prevent damage to your rims but also make for a smoother, more confidence-inspiring ride.


Designed to support your tyre at lower pressures, the Rimpact Pro V2 is the perfect choice for a wide range of riders, from weekend warriors to seasoned pros. Best suited to Enduro and DH applications, the Pro V2 has you covered.


Rimpact PRO V2 is a cumulative performance upgrade on the group test-winning PRO insert. It utilises a dual-density design with a dense protection shell that helps dissipate extreme forces. It works in combination with our classic Original foam that cuts vibration and locks beads in place. Crafted from high-quality closed-cell foam, the Rimpact Pro V2 is engineered for maximum performance gain, allowing you to run lower pressures without the negative associated effects like rim damage, flats, and lack of support. Its unique design provides unbeatable impact absorption, reducing the risk of tyre damage and giving you the confidence to tackle any line with confidence.

Product Type: Hex Key Fiiting, Non-Slip pump fitting
Web Description:
Valve Extenders

The simple way to ensure that you don't get caught without a spare inner tube for your deep section Aero rims. 
These simple but functional lightweight retro-fit adaptors will convert a standard length Presta Valve into a usable XL valve.

The clever Woodman designed exterior profile allows for most press-on high pressure pumps to inflate without slippage.  

Simple to fit: 
Threads onto standard type Presta valve as a normal valve cap would do, and features an internal hex-key recess to fully tighten.

To install, release the knurled Presta valve lock 2/3s of the way along it's spindle - as you normally would to be ready for a pump to be used, and install the extensions onto the valve.
(Existing air pressure will naturally keep the valve closed and air tight - as it does with other types of valve - and pump pressure will open the valve to inflate.)

Features:
Lightweight, precision CNC alloy.
Anodised Black or Red finish
Size options: 48mm or 72mm.

Product Type: All surface gravel/road.  Tubeless, Dual Compound, Folding - 60Tpi
Web Description:
The GXR is our all-surface gravel tyre. 

Designed to offer minimal resistance while rolling on the centre of the tread and maximum grip on the sides of the tread; The GXR tyre balances speed and grip. 

Utilising a 60TPI tubeless carcass the GXR is lightweight and reliable.

The range consists of the RXR, GXR and GXC models, which are all built around a lightweight and reliable 60TPI tubeless carcass. The carcass choice allows the tyres to conform to the terrain for grip and comfort, perfect for those off-road adventures. 

We incorporated leading edges into the centre of the tread for braking and acceleration traction in all conditions, while managing to retain a flush rolling surface. This means that the leading edges only come into play when used in the wet, or when off-road. In the dry and when on smooth surfaces the tyre rolls with minimal resistance.

The side tread offers a combination of spaced and specifically placed blocks. Combined with optimised siping the aggressive side tread helps the GXR offer enormous grip levels that are there when needed most.

To make this a truly all condition tyre, angled mud and water shedding channels have also been integrated on the shoulder tread.

The GXR tyre also offers a large tread wrap for extreme lean angles and features dual compounds. The rubber compound used in the centre is slightly firmer to increase rolling speeds and longevity. The edge compound being softer, combined with the large tread wrap means grip is further maximised.

Included with the tyres as part of our solution to packaging is a reusable Velcro frame strap. This allows you to wrap spares and accessories to your bike with ease.

Web Description:
The GXC is the most aggressive and traction enabling gravel tyre in our range.
Designed to excel on loose and challenging terrains, the GXC is the perfect weapon for all season riding.

Product Type: Road Plus Gravel. Tubeless, Dual Compound, Folding - 60Tpi
Web Description:
The RXR is our road plus tyre offering.

Minimal rolling resistance and maximum comfort are the primary aims of the RXR tyre. 

Utilising a 60TPI tubeless carcass the RXR is lightweight and reliable. The carcass choice allows the tyres to conform to the terrain for grip and comfort, perfect for those off-road adventures.

We incorporated leading edges into the centre of the tread for braking and acceleration traction in all conditions, while managing to retain a flush rolling surface. This means that the leading edges only come into play when used in the wet, or when off-road. In the dry and when on smooth surfaces the tyre rolls with minimal resistance.

To make this a truly capable road plus tyre in all conditions, angled mud and water shedding channels have also been integrated on the shoulder tread.

The RXR tyre also offers a large tread wrap for extreme lean angles and features dual compounds. The rubber compound used in the centre is slightly firmer to increase rolling speeds and longevity. The edge compound being softer, combined with the large tread wrap means grip is maximised for when you really need it.

Included with the tyres as part of our solution to packaging is a reusable Velcro frame strap. This allows you to wrap spares and accessories to your bike with ease.

Product Type: 35mm deep carbon Disc rim, 16/8H Ft/Rr Campag
Short Description: HALO CARBAURA RCD35 WHLS Pr CAMPAG
Web Description:
The latest version of our Carbaura RCD wheels have been designed to maximise aerodynamic benefit and with excellent linear compliance and lateral stiffness these wheels will keep you a bike length ahead of the competition!

Built around an optimised, Computational Fluid Dynamics tested, aerodynamic profile in a Carbon Fibre chassis, low weights, linear compliance, and lateral stiffness were our primary aims with the Carbaura RCD wheelsets.

Developed with a 21mm internal and 28mm external rim width which allows you to run a wide range of traditional or tubeless tyres. Optimised for a modern compliant and supple 28c tyre, delivering enhanced comfort and ultimate grip in any situation.

At the centre of the Carbaura RCD wheelsets are our RD2 hubs equipped with centre lock, to accept disc brakes for consistently powerful braking in all weathers and to eliminate rim wear.

The RD2 hub set also incorporates Supadrive, which offers a 120 point near-instant engagement with the ability to withstand substantial torque loads. With multiple World Championship titles across a range of disciplines, the Supadrive system is tried and tested to the very highest level and is our most advanced and reliable drive system to date.

Handcrafted with lightweight bladed aero spokes to decrease resistance and widely spaced hub flanges, the Carbaura RCD wheelsets have been built to reduce any possible lateral flex and increase power transfer. Both front and rear wheels use a 16/8e lacing pattern to balance spoke tensions and withstand torque and braking forces from the centre of the wheels.

Product Type: 35mm deep carbon Rim brake rim, Halo RS2 Hubs, 20H Ft,16/8H Rr Campag
Short Description: HALO CARBAURA RC35 RS2 WHLS Pr CAMPAG
Web Description:
Our Carbaura RC35 RS2 Supadrive wheelset have been designed to keep you one step ahead of the competition.

Built around an optimized, Computational Fluid Dynamics tested, aerodynamic profile in a Carbon Fibre chassis, low weights, linear compliance and lateral stiffness were our primary aims with the Carbaura RC wheelsets.

The tried and tested 19mm internal and 25mm external rim widths allow you to run a choice of traditional or tubeless tyres and are well suited to tyres ranging from 25c through to 32c widths to deliver enhanced comfort and grip.

To improve braking performance and rim durability on tough alpine descents, the braking surface has been finished in a 1.5k weave to dissipate heat throughout the carbon structure faster to dramatically reduce temperature build-up.

Handcrafted with lightweight bladed aero spokes to decrease resistance and widely spaced hub flanges the Carbaura RC wheelsets have been built to reduce any possible lateral flex and increase power transfer. The rear wheels uses a 16/8e lacing pattern to balance spoke tensions and withstand torque forces from the centre of the wheel whilst the front wheel uses radical lacing to reduce weight and drag.

Our RS Front and RS2 Supadrive hubs use fully sealed bearings for year-round longevity. The RS2 Supadrive hub offers a 120 point near instant engagement with the ability to withstand substantial torque loads, making them ideal for leisure riders right up to road race sprinters. With multiple World Championship titles across a range of disciplines the Supadrive system is tried and tested to the very highest level and is our most advanced and reliable drive system to date.

Wheelsets are supplied with SwissStop Black Prince pads.

SAFETY NOTICE:

Use only genuine 'Swiss Stop Black Prince' brake pads on these wheels. 

100kg is our recommended maximum rider weight limit for these wheels. Rider weights beyond 100kg are often still viable with our wheels, but this does add extra stress to the components and we recommend regular checks with an experienced mechanic. Any warranty issues will be assessed by our in house team on a case by case basis.

To enhance braking performance and rim durability on challenging alpine descents, the braking surface is finished in a 1.5k weave, which dissipates heat more effectively throughout the carbon structure, significantly reducing temperature build-up.

Handcrafted with lightweight bladed aero spokes to minimize resistance and widely spaced hub flanges, the Carbaura RC wheelsets are engineered to reduce lateral flex and maximize power transfer. The rear wheels feature a 16/8e lacing pattern to balance spoke tensions and withstand torque forces, while the front wheel employs radial lacing to reduce weight and drag.

Our RS2 Front and RS2 Supadrive hubs come with fully sealed bearings for year-round durability. With 120 points of engagement, these hubs ensure you never miss a pedal stroke, whether accelerating out of a corner or from a standing start, making them among the most responsive hubs on the market.

Each wheelset is supplied with SwissStop Black Prince brake pads.

Product Type: 35mm deep carbon Disc rim, 28H Ft/32H Rr Campag N3W 13sp
Short Description: HALO CARBAURA XCD35 WHLS Pr CAMPAG 13s
Web Description:
Introducing the Carbaura XCD Carbon Gravel wheelset, designed for speed and strength. Hand built in the UK. Developed to take on any long-distance gravel races, ultra-adventures, road plus or lightweight bike packing trips with ease. Designed with a 26mm internal rim width, the Carbaura XCD wheels are perfect for modern day gravel tyre sizes, making them ideal for larger volume tyres up to 50c. With a rim depth of 35mm, they are designed to offer a solid and reassuring ride, while still being compliant enough to make the ride comfortable. Enjoy mile after mile of off-road adventure. 
As well as featuring a wide internal rim measurement and a semi aero 35mm depth, the Carbaura XCD utilise our GXC hubs. Specially designed for gravel and off-road applications, the GXC hub features our instantaneous 120-point engagement Supadrive rear hub, centre lock brake fitment, sealed bearings and wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.
We have built the Carbaura XCD with non-proprietary J-bend spokes to ensure that, even if the worst should happen, you have a great chance of being able to fix your wheel and continue with your adventure wherever you are in the world. 
Supplied pre-taped, these are tubeless ready straight out of the box. 
With the Carbaura XCD you will leave no path unridden.

Product Type: 31mm deep, 24mm wide rim, Halo 16/8H hub
Web Description:
The Devaura Series is ready whatever the conditions, to offer you the aerodynamic advantage.
Our brand new Devaura Disc RD2 wheels utilise Center Lock disc brake technology, allowing consistently powerful braking on the road and CX courses alike.
The 19mm internal, 24mm external rim widths allow you to run your choice of traditional or tubeless tyres and are well suited to modern tyres ranging from 25C through to 38C widths to deliver enhanced comfort and grip.
At the core of our Devaura Disc RD2 wheels are our all new 120 point pick up RD2 Supadrive and RD2 Front hubs, with sealed bearings and wide spaced flanges for increased durability. These are hand built onto the dependable 30mm deep rims with our very own Aero Racing bladed spokes to decrease wind resistance. Both front and rear wheels use a 16/8e lacing pattern to balance spoke tensions and withstand torque and braking forces from centre of the wheels, reducing any possible lateral flex and increase power transfer.
Supplied pre-taped, Devaura Disc RD2 wheels are tubeless ready from the box.

Product Type: 31mm deep, 24mm wide rim, SP PL-7 12mm Dynamo hub
Short Description: HALO DEVAURA RD2 PL-7 DYNO Ft WHL
Web Description:
Wider, deeper, faster. Our Devaura RD2 wheels are ready whatever the conditions, to offer you the aerodynamic advantage.

Our Devaura RD2 700c Dyno wheel is comfortably wide and designed with aerodynamics in mind. The added benefit of the SP Dynamo hub allows use of lights and charging accessories.

Featuring a 30mm deep aero section rim with a 19mm internal, 24mm external, width profile allows you to run your choice of traditional or tubeless tyres and are ideally suited to run 25C and 28C tyres.

Product Type: 26mm Tubeless ready rim, SB IS Disc hub, 32H PG. - 12x100mm
Web Description:
Offering exceptional value, great performance and reliability, the Drove Line series are our most affordable All-Season Multi-Surface wheelset.

These are an ideal tubeless-ready wheelset that have been optimised for road, gravel and adventure applications.

With a 21mm internal and 26mm external width, the rim is suitable for a wide range of tyres from 25c road tyres up to 47c gravel tyres. Tubeless compatibility makes them versatile enough to be used with most CX and Gravel tyres and also makes them ideal for a winter road wheelset where tubeless and disc brakes are becoming a standard. The hooked profile rim also offers compatibility with traditional clincher tyres and inner tubes.

Handbuilt using plain gauge black ED-coated spokes with a higher spoke count than some, we have built these to last on any terrain while still not compromising on performance.

At the heart of the Drove Line wheels are the Ridge Line II series hubs.  Tried and tested on our Ridge Line MTB wheels, these sealed-bearing hubs offer performance and durability.  The rear hub also features a high-strength Cro-Mo axle and 4-pawl Cr-Mo HG type freehub with excellent engagement.

A Shimano Microspline type freehub is also available, aftermarket.
