Web Description:
The Drove Line series, wheels that deliver outstanding value, exceptional performance, and reliability. Designed to be our most budget-friendly All-Season Multi-Surface option, these wheels are perfect for road, gravel, adventure, and CX applications.

Tubeless-ready out of the box, the Drove Line series is optimised for versatility. The rim boasts a 21mm internal and 26mm external width, accommodating a broad range of tyresfrom 25c road tyres to robust 45c gravel tyres. Their tubeless compatibility not only makes them suitable for various CX and Gravel tyres but also positions them as an excellent choice for a winter road wheelset, where tubeless and disc brakes are becoming the norm. The hooked profile rim ensures compatibility with traditional clincher and tubeless tyres.

Built by hand with plain gauge black ED-coated spokes, the Drove Line series features a higher spoke count than some competitors, ensuring durability across diverse terrains without compromising on performance.

This version showcases the acclaimed SP (Shutter Precision) PD-7 6-bolt dyno hub, which comes standard as a 12mm x 100mm. For quick-release users, an aftermarket adaptor is available. Elevate your cycling experience with the unbeatable combination of affordability, performance, and reliability offered by the Drove Line series.

Product Type: 31mm deep, 24mm wide rim on RS2 hub,20H
Short Description: HALO DEVAURA RS2 Ft WHL SIL/BLK
Web Description:
The Devaura RS2, Tubeless ready clincher aerodynamic deep section wheelset is perfect for aero racers and year round riding.

Our Devaura RS2 700c wheels are mid-depth with aerodynamic benefits and faster rolling where it counts.

The wider stance of the 19mm internal, 24mm external, rim width profile allows you to run your choice of traditional or tubeless tyres and are well suited to modern tyres ranging from 25C to 35C widths to enhance comfort and grip.

Hand built with lightweight double butted spokes and featuring a 2:1 (16/8E) rear lacing pattern and wide spaced flanges that combine to reduce lateral flex in the rear wheel. The front wheel is built radial with a lightweight 20h RS2 hub.

Our sealed bearing RS2 Supadrive hub features 120 points of engagement, with 3 wedge pulls offering near instant engagement. You will never miss a pedal stroke.

Supplied pre-taped the Devaura Race RS2 wheels are tubeless ready from the box.
Product Name: Devaura RS2 700c Wheels Silver with Black Spokes

Product Type: 3/8", Double Wall rim on MXR Front BMX Hub, Blk DB Spokes, 32H
Web Description:
With huge international success our BMX Series of products are designed for holeshot after holeshot.

World Champions are made on our BMX Series.

The EX3 Expert wheels are for lighter riders and available at a mere 1300g.

A stiff, semi-aerodynamic box section rim ensures a superfast pick up when the gate drops.

The front wheel is fully anodised while the rear has a CNC sidewall for consistent braking performance.

In addition to an adept rim are our hugely successful MX Series hubs. MX Series hubs all feature huge flange spacing for stiffness and sealed bearings for longevity all conditions.

There are two drive options for the EX3 Rear wheel. Our MXR Supadrive hub with its instantaneous 120 point pickup Supadrive system, or MXR FW freewheel threaded hub as the simplified option which is well paired to the Halo Clickster 72 click freewheel.

Features
Front:

Halo MXF 32H hub (Red)
Halo Double butted spokes (Black) - radial laced.
Halo 7075 CNC Alloy nipples (Red) 
Halo EX3 rim with eyelets (All Black)
Weight: 625g exc. bolts
Supplied Cr-Mo axle bolts with alloy covers.
Spoke length: 166mm

Rear Cassette:

Halo MXRC 32H cassette hub with 1/2 alloy driver (Red)
Halo Double butted spokes (Black)
Halo 7075 CNC Alloy nipples (Red)
Halo EX3 rim with eyelets (Black with CNC brake wall)
Weight: 673g (exc. bolts or sprocket.)
Supplied with Cr-Mo axle bolts with alloy covers.
Spoke length: 175mm (non-drive side), 173mm (drive side) mm
Rear Freewheel:

Halo MXR-FW screw-on freewheel hub. 
Halo Double butted spokes (Black)
Halo 7075 CNC Alloy nipples (Red)
Halo EX3 rim with eyelets (Black with CNC brake wall)
Weight: 716g 
Supplied with Cr-Mo axle bolts with alloy covers.
Spoke length: 176mm ( non-drive side), 174mm (drive side) mm

Product Type: 22mm deep, 24mm wide, Tubeless ready, Anodised CNC brake surface, SB 120mm hub, Fixed/Freewheel, 32H
Short Description: HALO EVAURA TRACK WHL Rr FW SILVER
Web Description:
The most versatile track wheelset we have released to date. With a semi-aero Evaura rim and our TK track hubs, this wheelset offers speed and durability on and off the track.

Built with our road tested Evaura rims, they offer a generous 19mm internal making them perfect for larger volume tyres and they are one of the only track wheelsets on the market to offer tubeless ready compatibility straight out of the box. Perfect for winter fixed bikes, tracklocross bikes and tubeless road applications.

Our TK hubs are built with Japanese sealed bearings, a fixed/free threading option for those wanting to run fixed gear or freewheel options and with lightweight drilled axles, the Evaura wheels offer not only longevity, great value and low weights.

Product Type: 24mm wide road rim on Halo SL SB hub,20H
Short Description: HALO EVAURA RS2 Ft WHL BLACK
Web Description:
Wide, low profile and light. Our vertically compliant Evaura range is made for saving rotational weight on climbs and making long rides comfortable even in the last miles of an all-day effort.

Our Evaura RS2 700c wheels are low profile and vertically compliant, giving improved comfort on endurance events and are low inertia to aid climbing.

The wider stance of the 19mm internal, 24mm external, rim width profile allows you to run your choice of traditional or tubeless tyres and are well suited to modern tyres ranging from 25C through to 35C widths to deliver enhanced comfort and grip.

Hand built with lightweight double butted spokes and featuring a 2:1 (16/8E) rear lacing pattern and wide spaced flanges that combine to reduce lateral flex in the rear wheel.

Our sealed bearing RS2 Supadrive hub features 120 Points of engagement, with 3 wedge pulls offering near instant engagement. You will never miss a pedal stroke.

Supplied pre-taped the Evaura Race RS2 wheels are tubeless ready from the box.

Product Type: 24mm wide road rim on SP-SV-9 Dynamo hub,20H
Short Description: HALO EVAURA DYNO Ft WHL BLK
Web Description:
Wide, low profile and light. Our vertically compliant Evaura range is made for saving rotational weight on climbs and making long rides comfortable even in the last miles of an all-day effort.

Our Evaura 6D 700c Dyno wheel is low profile and vertically compliant, giving improved comfort on endurance events and are low inertia to aid climbing. The added benefit of the SP Dynamo hub allows use of lights and charging accessories.

The wider stance of the 19mm internal, 24mm external, rim width profile allows you to run your choice of traditional or tubeless tyres and are well suited to modern tyres ranging from 25C through to 35C widths to deliver enhanced comfort and grip.

The Evaura 6D 700c Dyno Wheel utilises a SP Dynamo SV-9 6V 3W* ultra-compact dynamo hub.

Supplied pre-taped the Evaura RD2 wheel is tubeless ready from the box.

*Note: SV-9 hubs are now labelled as 6V 1.5w. This is to comply with the strict German StVZO regulations.
When used with 26 or 700c wheels the output can drop very slightly below 6V3 W at low speeds, but is 6V 3W at normal riding speeds

Product Type: Double Wall rim on 3/8" MXR Front BMX Hub, Blk DB Spokes, 28H
Short Description: HALO EX-3 MXR Ft WHL 20x1.5" BLACK
Web Description:
With a history and heritage in the BMX wheel world, we have produced the latest range of EX3 wheels to be lighter and stronger than previous models.

Designed for the rigors of BMX racing, where speed, manoeuvrability and durability are important factors. The EX3 MX range has be crafted to provide optimal performance on tracks and courses, offering a good balance between lightweight construction and strength.

Riders of our BMX series of wheels have gone on to have international success, designed for holeshot after holeshot. The EX3 are designed for lighter riders and the lightest combination now weighs in at a mere 1300g. A stiff, semi-aero section rim ensures a super-fast pickup at gate starts.

We now offer 2 options of rear with our legendary Supadrive system, offering 120 POI, meaning you will never miss a beat on a gate start or rolling into a turn. We also offer a screw on freewheel option for those requiring that. All the hubs feature huge flange spacing for stiffness and strength and sealed bearings for longevity in all conditions.

The front wheel and rear disc wheel is fully anodised while the rear cassette and freewheel has a CNC sidewall for consistent braking performance.

Riders of our BMX series of wheels have gone on to have international success, designed for holeshot after holeshot. The EX3 are designed for lighter riders and the lightest combination now weighs in at a mere 1300g. A stiff, semi-aero section rim ensures a super-fast pickup at gate starts.

We now offer 2 options of rear with our legendary Supadrive system, offering 120 POI, meaning you will never miss a beat on a gate start or rolling into a turn. We also offer a screw on freewheel option for those requiring that. All the hubs feature huge flange spacing for stiffness and strength and sealed bearings for longevity in all conditions.

The rear disc wheel is fully anodised while the rear cassette and freewheel has a CNC sidewall for consistent braking performance.

Product Type: MT2 Front 6B Disc Hub, 110x15 and 20mm inc, 32 Silver DB Spokes
Web Description:
Designed for and tested on the Downhill World Cup Circuit, for lap crushing confidence.

With a honed 27.5mm internal width, Gravitas wheels offer tyres large sidewall support, while remaining narrow enough to avoid unnecessary rock collisions.

Using our tried and tested asymmetric design we have equalised spoke tensions and built a package that dominates descents, whilst cutting down on bulk where it isnt needed. To compensate for the differences in wall length and strength of an asymmetric design, the wall thicknesses have been proportioned to balance out impact forces equally. The Gravitas offers offset wheel benefits, without compromise.

At the core of these Gravitas wheels are our instantaneous 120 point pick up MT Supadrive and MT Front hubs, with sealed bearings and super wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.

100% hand-built and pre-fitted with tubeless tape, Gravitas wheels are tubeless ready from the box.

Coloured decal kits available aftermarket.

Product Type: Wide Boy non-disc Grey front hub,15x100mm, MT-SS 10x135 Rear hub,32H, SIlver DB spokes
Web Description:
A tribute to Halos history in the dirt jump and MTB market, we have created this retro inspired Chaos Dirt Jump Wheelset.

Featuring the iconic wide boy front hub and MT-SS 135mm x M10 (which is adaptable for 142mm X 12mm for thru axle frames) They are laced with Stainless double butted silver spokes and black brass nipples to the durable Chaos rim. For this edition we have shot peened and anodised the Chaos rims in a classic grey colour. Tubeless taped and ready out the box.

These wheels utilise our tried and tested Chaos rim which offers tubeless compatibility where required, as well as a 22.5mm internal (28mm external) width. These widths have been optimised for strength in addition to tyre profiling.

To offer versatility the front hub is adapitable to fit both older and more modern frame standards. The optional adaptors for various fork types further enhance compatibility, allowing riders to customise their setup according to their preferences.

This hub comes as 15x100mm thru axle as standard. 
Optional extra adaptors are available to fit with forks using:
 5/9x100mm QR
 20x100mm Thru-axle
 20x110mm Thru-axle

The use of the MT Supadrive SS hub on the rear wheel is a great choice for high-performance riding, with its 120-point Supadrive mechanism and sealed bearings, it provides a smooth and reliable power transfer. Additionally, the cassette spacer kit (1x 5mm, 2x 2.5mm, 1x 0.5mm and Lock ring.) and the option to use Fat foot sprockets in a range of sizes offer further customisation possibilities for riders seeking the perfect gear ratio.

The Chaos Dirt Jump Wheels are designed to meet the demands of professional riders while offering durability, performance, and style to riders of all levels. It's no wonder they're tried and tested by international professionals like Sam Pilgrim and Matt Jones.

Product Type: MT Supadrive Boost 12x148 SB Disc Hub, 32H, HG, Black DB Spokes
Short Description: HALO CHAOS WHL SDV148 Rr 26"BLK HG
Web Description:
Introducing the latest evolution in our Chaos lineup  the Chaos in Boost Fitment. Responding to the growing demand for mini mullet wheelsets, we've taken our iconic Chaos wheels to the next level, backed by real-world use from some of the best riders in the world.

Product Type: MT2 Front 6B Disc Hub, 110x15 and 20mm inc, 32 Black TB Spokes
Web Description:
Designed for and tested at trail centres, bike parks, street riding and at Hardline by some of the best riders in the business. The all new Skelta wheelset is one of the most durable in Mountain Biking and is built using 6069 T6 heat-treated aluminium with an invisible seamless welded joint for added security. The Skelta rim features a shot-peened surface which provides increased corrosion and fatigue resistance, as well as a uniform matt finish.

After more than a year of heavy testing weve developed the rim design to offer an even stronger wheel without excessive weight. Skeltas enhanced 30 mm internal width, offers a confidence inspiring hooked rim profile for added control and tyre security and is compatible with all types of tyres, tubeless or not. We have optimised the width for tyre sizes from 2.25 - 2.8, making them compatible with lightweight XC tyres for ripping local trails, through to heavy casing DH tyres for the gnarliest conditions.

At the centre of the Skelta wheels is our iconic MT Hubs. All the Skelta wheels are built with our triple butted J-bend spokes so you can easily source replacements wherever youre riding in the world.

Our Skelta Wheels or rims have been put through their paces, not only throughout the Scottish Highlands and the trails at Hardline in Wales but further afield performing on some of Utahs finest dirt. A challenge they were more than up to and a testament to not only their strength, but also their resilience to some of the hardest riding conditions in the world.

Whatever type of riding you do, the Skelta is ready for your next adventure.

Product Type: 35mm Tubeless ready rim, SB IS Disc hub, 32H PG. - 15x110mm Boost
Web Description:
Offering exceptional value, great performance and reliability, the Ridge Line II series are our feature packed entry level, Thru-axle and tubeless compatible MTB wheels.

With a 30mm internal and 35mm external width, the rim is well suited to most modern MTB tyres from 2.25 to 2.8.  Tubeless compatible using a hooked bead profile also offers compatibility with traditional clincher tyres and inner tubes if so desired.

Handbuilt with 32 no-nonsense plain gauge J-bend spokes and durable brass nipples front and rear into stainless rim eyelets, we have built these wheels to last.

At the heart of these wheels are our RL II series hubs in either standard MTB or Boost MTB widths for Thru-axle frames and forks making them a no-fuss option for modern trail riders.

The rear hubs also feature high-strength Cro-Mo axles and 4-pawl Cr-Mo HG-type freehubs with excellent engagement.

A Shimano Microspline type freehub option is also available in Boost spacing.

Product Type: 80mm wide Powdercoated rim on 135/142mm SB Fat bike Hub.
Web Description:
Our Fat Bike Series has been designed for and used in the most adverse landscapes the world has to offer.

When the going gets tough, Tundra will pull you through. Snow, sand and mud alike do not stand in your way with our fat bike wheel of choice.

Our Tundra wheels have a wide 75mm internal rim width designed for increased tyre volume and a huge tyre footprint. Benefits of the Tundra are unparalleled grip, comfort and reduced pinch flats.

Weight saving rim cut outs reduce the bulk of the Tundra to make a nimble wheelset.

Tundra wheels use our FAT hubs with the ever smooth 6Drive system, sealed bearings and wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.

Product Type: 27mm deep, Anodised CNC brake surface, SB hub, 32H Fixed/Freewheel
Short Description: HALO AEROTRACK Rr WHL BLK FW
Web Description:
Tested by the couriers and track riders of the world, our Track Series has seen some of the hardest testing there is to offer. Rivals, side streets and traffic are no match for our Track Series.

Our Aerotrack wheels are as at home on the track as they are on the congested streets.

Built with a single coloured*, aerodynamic, 14mm internally and 19.5mm external, wide rim the Aerotrack wheel can take daily abuse without issue due to their sturdy construction.

Spinning on our legendary TK with Japanese sealed bearings, various rear drive options and lightweight drilled axles, the Aerotrack wheels are not only offer longevity, but great value and low weights.



*The rim features a CNC machined brake wall before the colour finish is applied. It is possible to brake on this surface, but braking may be impaired by the colour coating, which will also wear away if brake pads are applied

Product Type: 3/8", Double Wall rim on MXR Front BMX Hub, Blk DB Spokes, 32H
Short Description: HALO SUB-4 MXR Ft WHL 20" BLACK
Web Description:
World Champions are made on our BMX Series.

Our Sub-4 Race wheels have a background of World and National Championship wins.

Available from under 1500g for a pair, the Sub-4 wheels accelerate like nothing else, yet can still take impacts when trying out new lines. The front wheel is fully anodised while the rear has a CNC sidewall for consistent braking performance.

Sub-4 Race wheels are built around our hugely successful MX Series hubs. MX Series hubs all feature huge flange spacing for lateral stiffness and sealed bearings for longevity all conditions.

There are two drive options for the Sub-4 Rear wheel. Our MXR Supadrive hub with its instantaneous 120 point pickup Supadrive system, or MXR FW freewheel threaded hub as the simplified option which is well paired to the Halo Clickster 72 click freewheel.

Our Sub-4 Race wheels are the racing edge.

Halo MXF 32H hub 
Halo Double butted spokes 
Halo 7075 CNC Alloy nipples 
Halo Sub4 rim with eyelets (All Black)
Weight: 705g exc. bolts
Supplied Cr-Mo axle bolts with alloy covers.
Spoke length: 190mm
Halo Sub 4 Rear:
Halo MXRC 36H cassette hub 
Halo Double butted spokes 
Halo 7075 CNC Alloy nipples 
Halo Sub4 rim with eyelets (Black with CNC brake wall)

Spoke lengths: 188/186mm

Utilising a wide 30mm internal width rim the Vapour 35 wheels bridge the gap between plus sized wheels and more narrow traditional offerings. With a greater width comes increased tyre volume and stability.

In addition to an adept rim, the Vapour 35 wheels utilise our instantaneous 120 point pickup MT Supadrive and MT Front hubs, with sealed bearings and wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.

Supplied pre-taped the Vapour 35 is tubeless ready from the box.

Product Type: GXC Supadrive CL Disc Hub, 32H,12x142mm, Campag, Black DB Spokes
Short Description: HALO VAPOUR GXC Rr CAMP 27.5" STL
Web Description:
The Vapour GXC wheelset is the lightest in the Vapour range. Crafted for the longest distance gravel races, ultra-distance adventure riding, XC racing, road plus as well as lightly loaded touring.

Built with a 21mm internal width rim the Vapour GXC wheel is ideal for a gravel, road plus and narrower MTB tyres.

As well as a lightweight and dependable rim, the Vapour GXC wheels utilise our all new GXC hubs specifically designed for this wheelset. The GXC hubs feature instantaneous 120 point engagement, centre lock, sealed bearings and wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.

We have used non-proprietary J-bend spokes to ensure should the worst happen, you have a great chance of being able to fix your wheel and carry on your adventure.

Supplied pre-taped the Vapour GXC is tubeless ready from the box.

Product Type: GXC Front CL Disc Hub, 28H, 12x100mm F), Silver DB Spokes
Short Description: HALO VAPOUR GXC WHL Ft 27.5" SILVER
Web Description:
The Vapour GXC Tour wheelset has been crafted for the longest distance loaded touring adventures.

Built with a 21mm internal width rim the Vapour GXC Tour wheel is ideal for touring, gravel, road plus and narrower MTB tyres.

As well as a lightweight and dependable rim, the Vapour GXC Tour wheels utilise our all new GXC hubs, specifically designed for the Vapour GXC wheel range. The GXC hubs feature instantaneous 120 point engagement, centre lock, sealed bearings and wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.

With the increased 36 hole spoke count on these Touring optimised wheels, increased load weights are transferred directly through the wheel as spokes run parallel from one side of the rim, to the other. We have also used non-proprietary J-bend spokes to ensure should the worst happen, you have a great chance of being able to fix your wheel and carry on your adventure.

Supplied pre-taped the Vapour GXC Tour wheelset is tubeless ready from the box.

Product Type: GXC Front SP PL-8X Dynamo CL Disc Hub, 28H 15x100mm Ft, Black DB Spokes
Web Description:
The Vapour GXC Dyno Front Wheel has been crafted for the longest distance gravel races, ultra-distance adventure riding, XC racing, road plus as well as lightly loaded touring.

Built with a 21mm internal width rim the Vapour GXC wheel is ideal for a gravel, road plus and narrower MTB tyres.

As well as a lightweight and dependable rim, the Vapour GXC Dyno wheel utilises SP Dynos PL-8X hub, which combines a precision 6V3W dynamo with a modern 15mm thru-axle (adaptable using our 15 to12mm adaptor sleeve) and centre lock disc mount. The added benefit of the SP Dynamo hub allows use of lights and charging accessories.

We have used non-proprietary J-bend spokes to ensure should the worst happen, you have a great chance of being able to fix your wheel and carry on your adventure.

Supplied pre-taped the Vapour GXC Dyno Front Wheel is tubeless ready from the box.

Matching Vapour GXC rear wheels and non-dyno front wheels are available.
 
* Note: End caps are 21mm outer diameter. Some 12mm thru axle forks have a 19mm recess and are not compatible with hubs with 21mm end caps.

Product Type: MT Front Disc Hub, 15x100, 32H (15mm Ft), Black DB Spokes
Web Description:
Built around the traverses of the Enduro World Series our Vortex wheels redefine what Enduro wheels are.

With a generous 33mm internal width Vortex wheels increase tyre volume and maximise the available grip on offer. Using an asymmetric design we have equalised spoke tensions and built a package that leaves descents in its wake, whilst cutting down weight where it isnt needed for energy sapping climbs. To compensate for the differences in wall length and strength of an asymmetric design, the wall thicknesses have been proportioned to balance out impact forces equally. The Vortex offers offset wheel benefits, without compromise.

At the core of our Vortex wheels are our instantaneous 120 point pick up MT Supadrive and MT Front hubs, with sealed bearings and super wide spaced flanges for increased stiffness and durability.

100% hand built and pre fitted with tubeless tape, Vortex wheels are tubeless ready from the box.

Coloured decal kits available aftermarket.

Web Description:
Expanding on our award-winning Dominion A4, Dominion A2, targets Cross Country and Trail riders.

Dominion A2 features a two-piston caliper. Dominion A2 includes all the performance from the Dominion A4, utilizing a compact, two-piston caliper.

Dominion's master cylinder is factory tuned for the shortest dead stroke possible and a crisp bite point. The Dominion A4 caliper utilizes two Ø24mm pistons in the most structurally rigid design possible. It features a cold-forged caliper and KingPin structural pad retention bolt that increases stiffness.

With a motorsports-inspired Two-Stroke dual port bleed system, industry-leading DOT 5.1 fluid and Kevlar hose, the hydraulic system is engineered for ultimate performance across all temperatures and easy maintenance.

Dominion A2 features the proprietary QuickBite² system for fast and consistent burnish, coupled with our D-Series rotor to manage the heat with less braking noise.

SRL (Short Reach Lever) - ergonomically designed for the smaller hand or short reach level positioning.

Short Description: HT X-3 CLIP PEDALS SB GRN CAMO
Web Description:
he X3 is HTs large platform DH & Enduro-focused 'clipless' pedal.

Pedal of choice for aggressive riders such as Aaron Gwinn and Scott 'Boom Boom' Beaumont, who appreciate the exceptional adjustability and security offered by HTs cleat system.
The large platform (85mm wide x 91mm long) with strategically positioned grip pins provides additional shoe support during unclipped moments.
Includes a bolt-on stainless steel plate at the front of the pedal to help guide your shoe cleat into the correct location.
Svelte 14.25mm thick body improves ground clearance and pedalling comfort.
Cro-Mo steel axle and sealed bearings with IGUS bushes for improved durability.
X1 (4-degree float) and X1F (8-degree float) cleats both included the box.

Product Type: For 11/8" Steerer - M6 Thread (Bulk workshop pack)
Web Description:
Ahead Starnut

Threadless headset system fork internal Starnut for pre-loading bearings.  

Item features 2 layers of steel sprung tangs. 
Starnut knocked into place and the tangs bite into the fork to prevent extraction when a central headset adjusting bolt is tightened. 

Fits regular steel or alloy 1 1/8" (28.6mm) external diameter fork steerer tubes.

Warning:
Do not use on Carbon steerer tube forks. The sharp spring metal tangs can damage the delicate Carbon structure.


Two types are available
Regular solid bolt option with M6 internal thread
Hollow freestyle M10 threaded bolt for passing front cable through the headset.


(Bulk workshop packing)

Product Type: Single Speed, Society Xeno II fork, Halo T2 Wheels
Web Description:
The Dr Jekyll has featured in the Identiti bikes lineup for over 2 decades from its humble beginnings in the late 1990s to the icon that it is today. The Dr Jekyll is the first model we produced, its the reason we still produce bikes today. The Dr Jekyll is in our blood and is here to stay.

The current generation Dr Jekyll is built for shredding the local trails, skate parks, 4x or pump track. With custom geometry offering short, adjustable chain stays and a choice in sizes. Over the last 20-plus years, we have listened, adjusted, evolved and have come to know what makes a great dirt jump and 4x bike. This is what we do at Identiti.

The comp is our entry-level complete bike featuring Society 100mm Dirt jump forks, Gusset components and Halo wheels and tyres, ready to ride at the local from the start.

Product Type: Bolt-In Axle kit to fit 15mm Thru axle hubs into QR Rebate forks
Web Description:
This relatively simple axle kit allows the standard QR type Identiti Rebate fork to work with a 15mmx100mm Thru-axle type front hub.  


Features:
15x100mm alloy axle installs into most Non-Boost thru-axle front hubs and is tightened using robust 9.5mm (3/8) diameter Cr-Mo bolts on either end. 
Supplied with neat finishing CNC alloy head covers for the bolts.
(Allen key tools not included)

In the event that one of the bolts becomes stubborn and spins the axle instead of releasing the alloy axle features an internal 6mm hex key broach, allowing you to hold the axle with a 2nd Hex (Allen type) key.

Specifications:
- 15x100mm Aluminium Thru-type axle.
- 6mm Hex key internal broach
- 8mm Hex Key Cr-Mo bolts with 9.5x30mm threaded shaft.
- 22mm outer diameter CNC alloy cap.

Dirt Juice Ultimate Workshop Degreaser is a fast-acting, grease-defeating remedy for anything that needs grease gone fast. Its your secret weapon in the workshop when you need to clean out old gloop and grime, ready to start again from fresh.

Bunged-up bearings, crusty chains, hammered headsets, you name it. If its oily, greasy and grimy, our powerful Workshop Degreaser will sort it.

Use it at close range to blast gunk and old grease from bearings or apply from range for more general cleaning or removal of greasy residues or spills. Our grease defeating formula will quickly break down and strip tough waterproof greases, chain waxes and old sticker residue.

Think of it as your workshop grab-and-go to clean up components when servicing or for general workshop tinkering. When things get greasy, oily, seized up or crusty just reach for the big green can.

Using Workshop Degreaser is easy, simply blast, spray and wipe away or leave it to evaporate away quickly by itself.

Product Type: General Cleaner
Web Description:
Your secret weapon against wild winters and typically shady British summers. Dirt Juice is a fast acting Bike Cleaner thats brutal on mud but kind on paint.

Dirt Juice grabs grime and gives it a right good duffing up, leaving it powerless to resist your bike washing. It works fast, its fully biodegradable and itll also do the job as a light degreaser to leave your bits shining.


It comes with a premium super foamy and high output trigger spray. It's also PH neutral and safe to use on all surfaces.

Features

Product Type: Concentrate Bike Cleaner can be diluted to make 10 Litres of Dirt Juice General Cleaner - VERY GOOD
Web Description:
Use neat to shift the most stubborn grime or dilute to transform into 10L of our regular, powerful and fast-acting Bike Cleaner.

Super Concentrate offers supreme value, creating 10L of Bike Cleaner at £1.99/L. It's the best value and least hassle way to buy your bike wash by far. AND, it's kinder to the environment. It will also work as a light degreaser in its concentrated form.


Think of it as our regular Dirt Juice Bike Cleaner, just with the water removed. Like a bottle of orange squash, right? Simply mix Super 9:1 with water and it transforms into our regular Bike Cleaner.

We'd recommend that you buy Super Concentrate when your original bottle of Dirt Juice Bike Cleaner runs out.

When Dirt Juice runs out, grab your bottle of Super and refill, recharge and reload that original bottle 10 more times.

That's 10 fewer trips to the bike shop and 10 fewer hand-in-your-pocket moments. Not to mention the huge savings and reduction in plastic waste by shopping a little smarter.

Mega value, mega easy, zero hassle.

If youd rather spend your hard-earned on the apres-ride beers and chips than on bike cleaners, this is your golden ticket.

Except its green. Its your green ticket.

Product Type: The Original Suspension Lubricant and Cleaner
Web Description:
Your very own suspension guru in a can.

Fork Juice sprays on in seconds and instantly spruces up your fork, shock and dropper for smoother trails and less mechanical fails. It lubes up dry seals, drives out dirt and brings back that box fresh, ready-for-anything suspension feeling.

Its like having your very own suspension expert, without all the hassle of having to kidnap one and lock them in your garage.

Fork Juice is a do-it-all spray-on suspension lube and protectant. It lubes seals and stanchions to reduce friction and increase small bump sensitivity. Your suspension units and dropper post will feel more plush and there will be less breakaway force required between your seals and stanchions.

Got a sticky dropper? Fork Juice is an instant cure, just lash a little on the stanchion and cycle the post for an instant quick fix.

This isn't just any old spray, it's the original and best. It pulls grime out from your fork seals allowing you to wipe it away before it finds its way deep into your most expensive components.

Product Type: Gloss Finish Frame Polish
Web Description:
Frame Juice is your ticket to a box fresh bicycle after even the most miserable of mud baths. Its the final step in your bike wash and guarantees that your bike will return to the garage gleaming with no streaks and stains, blotches or blemishes.

Use Frame Juice as a spray-and-polish part of your bike wash or lash it on pre-ride to protect your bike with a mud-repelling force field. Our cranberry scented wonder spray helps to reduce dirt adhesion to make cleaning your bike easier than ever.

Mist it on and buff to a shine with the Juice Rag. For an extra high showroom shine, apply a second coat and don't wipe.

Product Type: Beaded Hand Cleaner
Short Description: JUICE LUBES HAND JUICE HAND CLEANER 500ml
Web Description:
For the grimiest of grease monkeys. Hand Juice is a kind-on-skin, mean-on-the-unclean Hand Cleaner that restores filthy paws back to brilliance.

Hand Juice works just like soap but with added grease-melting ingredients. And in case youre wondering, Hand Juice contains absolutely zero nasty-on-the-environment plastic beads that youll find in other cleaners. Theyre replaced with natural ground walnut shells to help scrub away muck. Simply blob it on, rub, rinse and repeat if needed.

Packed with sanitisers and skin emollients, Hand Juice is also biodegradable. The pleasing fruit salad aroma is guaranteed to put a smile on your better half's face at least half of the time, every time.

Allergy advice: This product contains nuts. Specifically, ground walnut shell.

Product Type: Matt Finish Detailer
Web Description:
Perfect for polishing your helmet... buffs those matt bits back to brilliance and leaves a mud-resistant, protective coating.

Frame Juice Matt is your Blueberry scented secret formula to a beautiful matt finish. It protects and preserves, stepping in to buff your bike to brilliance leaving no streaks, smears or oily marks.

It restores matt paint jobs, vinyl and plastic parts back to good-as-new lustre and leaves a dry, non-sticky protective force-field behind that will shrug off mud and water. Did we mention it also smells nice and it's biodegradable?

It works a treat on mountain bikes, road bikes and everything in between. Use Frame Juice on dry surfaces post-wash or use it as a grab-and-go touch spray to remove sweaty oily marks between full works hose downs.

Product Type: Low Friction Grease By Slickoleum
Web Description:
Slick Juice is a lightweight friction reducing grease, designed specifically for bicycles. It's a lithium-free slick grease that's perfect for use in suspension units, dropper-posts, freehubs and more.

Designed to greatly reduce the breakaway friction of reciprocating seals, Slick Juice impregnates the pores of metal surfaces to further reduce friction and increase lubrication.

Think of it as SRAM Butter, because that's what it is. The top performing, industry wide used and approved suspension assembly grease. Blended by Slickoleum in the USA and recommended and chosen by the leading suspension unit manufacturers worldwide.

Slick Juice guarantees a consistent feel and maximum plushness where you need it most - in those fancy shock units. It's compatible with elastomers, O-rings, seals and oil baths. It's also non-migratory and highly resistant to water washout to help maintain performance between service intervals. Did we mention it fights off corrosion and oxidation?

Developed for suspension assembly, but by no means limited to. Use it on gear cables, axles, or even in sealed bearings for some extra speed on race day.

Product Type: 1 x10m roll (enough for 2 rims)
Web Description:
Let us take you one step closer to becoming airtight. Designed specifically to make tubeless setup a breeze, our tape is primed with the finest pressure sensitive adhesive and constructed from high tensile strength dual-layered film.

With its optimum amount of stretch and rigid recyclable core the tape can be pulled and applied with tension, it'll also contour perfectly to the shape of your rim making it a doddle to install. If that wasn't enough, we've also included a handful of finishing strips to ensure that perfect airtight seal.

Our unique adhesive holds fast and won't leave any sticky, gunky residue should you need to remove the tape at a later date.

The best looking, best performing, most tooled-up valves in the game and absolutely packed with features to make tubeless super simple.

Made from tough 7075 aluminium, each of our valve caps is packed with 3 super useful tools, that's more than any other on the market. Each has a valve core removal tool and spoke keys for 3.2mm and 3.4mm spoke nipples. What's more, these tools are on both valve caps so they match and it's no stress if you were to lose one whilst out on the trail.

Tubeless neednt be a faff and our valves make it easy peasy.

First up, the valve core is removable to make adding sealant a breeze, and that valve core tool is always close at hand when you need it.

There's a 4mm Allen key base for easy fitting or removal and our tapered rubber grommets ensure the perfect airtight fit. Last but not least, a slotted base works perfectly with your tyre inserts and flat-sided edges on the locking nut help you clamp it down tight.

And, if the worst does happen whilst you're out on the trail. The spoke key tools are always there ready to straighten things out and get you back on your way again.

Product Type: Dropper post with Bluetooth remote included - Total length 397mm, Insert length 214mm
Web Description:
Revolutionise Your Ride with the LEV Circuit Wireless Dropper Seat Post

In a groundbreaking leap for the world of cycling, KS proudly introduces the LEV Circuit wireless dropper seat post, a true game-changer that redefines the art of cycling. The LEV Circuit is more than just a seat post; it's a statement of innovation, performance, and a commitment to excellence. Built with proven internals from KS popular LEV series, it offers fully wireless control and up to 200mm of travel.

Cut the Cord

Say goodbye to the clutter of cables and the hassle of internal routing. With the LEV Circuit, we've reimagined the traditional dropper seat post, eliminating the need for cables entirely. The LEV Circuit offers a seamless, fully wireless control experience.

Wireless Mastery

Thanks to its Bluetooth connectivity, the communication between the remote control and the dropper seat post is quick and precise, ensuring you get the exact seat height you desire with just a touch.

Power Your Adventure

Equipped with a removable and rechargeable battery, the LEV Circuit ensures you're always ready to hit the trail. The remote control is powered by a readily available CR 2032 battery, so you'll never be caught off guard.

Built to Conquer Any Terrain

When you're out in the wild, you need gear that can keep up. The LEV Circuit boasts an IP67 rating, making it dust-tight and water-resistant. No matter the conditions, your seat post will perform flawlessly.

Precision at Its Core

Tailor your ride to perfection with the adjustable air pressure feature, easily accessed at the base of the post. The LEV Circuit adapts to your unique preferences and riding style, ensuring maximum comfort and control.

Versatile Saddle Compatibility

We understand that riders have different preferences when it comes to saddles. That's why the LEV Circuit's saddle clamp design is compatible with 6 round and 6x7 or 7x9 oval carbon rails, giving you the freedom to choose the perfect saddle for your ride.

Everything You Need

When you choose the LEV Circuit, you're choosing a complete package. The product includes the wireless remote, battery, and charger, ensuring you have everything you need to hit the trail right away.

Features
Wireless actuation
No cables or connectors
Quick signal transfer thanks to the Bluetooth connection between remote and dropper seat post
Removable and rechargeable battery
Remote powered by a CR2302 battery
IP67 rated (dust-tight and water-resistant)
up to 200mm of travel
New internal design with hydraulic valve at the top of the post
Adjustable air pressure accessed at the base of the post
The saddle clamp design is compatible with 6 round and 6x7 or 7x9 oval carbon rails
Remote, battery and charger included
LEV Circuitcut the cord.

Product Type: DiaCompe/Genetic/Sunrace 2 x9sp build, Retro Wheels
Web Description:
SEVENTIES STYLE RACE REPLICA
The Kings is a classic road bike, based on the Kings triple butted, Reynolds 853 steel frameset.
The bike uses new 'retro' components to offer a classic look in a modern machine.

The Reynolds 853 double butted frame has variable sized sports geometry using a brazed and lugged construction method and features Triple butted Cr-mo forks. Theres ample clearance for up to 700x28C tyres.  A 1" threaded headset and a 68mm BSA threaded bottom bracket keep those fittings classically simple.  Beautiful high gloss paint finish, half chrome forks and rear stays with panelled graphics and gold lug lining complete the frameset. 

Components wise; the polished Sunrace RDRS rear mech and a Sora front are mated to Dia-Compe down tube, power ratchet, friction shifters to offer a classic shifting 2x9 experience. While the forged and CNC machined Heritage double crankset gives a respectful nod to some classic Italian styling. 

Brakes are solid performing Dia-Compe BRS101 dual pivot brakes with classic Open cables and gum-rubber hooded levers. 

Wheels are Halos classic Retro, featuring sealed bearings and a medium high spoke flange hubs on double-wall eyeleted rims. The wheels are high polished silver finish with stainless spokes for that classic gleaming retro style.

The finishing kit is also in keeping with the overall retro styling. A forged and polished aluminium Genetic Hyoid quill type stem is mated with Genetics Heritage bars and wrapped in comfortable Faux leather perforated padded tape.  A beautifully crafted, narrow Brookes B17 leather saddle sits on top of the polished and laser etched aluminium Genetic Heritage seat post to add an that extra finishing touch.

Product Type: DiaCompe/Genetic/Sunrace 2 x10sp build, Retro Wheels
Short Description: LB St JOHNS RETRO 9s BIKE 50cm GRN
Web Description:
CLASSIC CLUBMAN BIKE FOR LEISURE-SPORT RIDES
For Sunday morning rides, sportives, commuting, light touring/Audax, this bike can do it all.
This bike uses new 'retro' components to offer a classic look in a modern machine.

The Reynolds 725 double butted frame uses a brazed and lugged construction method and features Triple butted Cr-mo forks. Designed to take centre-pull brake calipers and features a slightly relaxed variable sized sports geometry to accept mudguards and rear rack.  Clearance best suits 700x25c tyres with mudguards or up to 32C tyres without mudguards.  
A 1" threaded headset and a 68mm BSA threaded bottom bracket keep those fittings classically simple.  
Beautiful high gloss paint finish, half chrome forks and rear stays with panelled graphics and gold lug lining complete the frameset. 

Components wise; the polished Sunrace RDRS rear mech and a Sora front are mated to Dia-Compe down tube, power ratchet, friction shifters to offer a classic shifting 2x9 experience. A forged and CNC machined and polished alloy Genetic Heritage Clubman crankset gives a respectful nod to some classic Italian styling whilst delivering useful modern compact chainset 50-34T ratios. 

Braking is supplied by the legendary Dia-Compe GC610 centre-pulls that offer unparalleled style and performance, mated with classic gum-rubber hooded Dia Compe levers. 

Wheels are Halos classic Retro, featuring sealed bearings and a medium high spoke flange hubs on double-wall eyeleted rims. The wheels are high polished silver finish with stainless spokes for that classic gleaming retro style.

The finishing kit is also in keeping with the overall retro styling. A forged and polished aluminium Genetic Hyoid quill type stem is mated with Genetics Heritage bars and wrapped in comfortable Faux leather perforated padded tape.  A beautifully crafted, Brookes B17 standard leather saddle sits on top of the polished and laser etched aluminium Genetic Heritage seat post to add an that extra finishing touch.

Product Type: Genetic/DiaCompe single speed track build, Halo Wheels
Short Description: LB TRINITY PISTA SS BIKE 49cm BLUE
Web Description:
STYLISH REYNOLDS 531 FIXIE/TRACK BIKE 
A classically beautiful, Reynolds 531 streel retro track style bike for the cycling enthusiast who wants something special.

This frameset is a modern work of retro art with its narrow Reynolds 531 double butted tubing joined together using classic brazed lugs, and mated to butted, tapered Cr-mo curved forks.  
A 1" threaded headset and a 68mm BSA threaded bottom bracket keep those fittings classically simple.  Designed for 120mm width track rear hubs and drilled to accept side-pull brake calipers front and rear for safety.  
Finished in either a gleaming polished and lacquered full chrome or a beautiful high gloss metallic Blue paint with half chrome forks and rear stays. Panelled graphics and gold lug lining complete the outstanding looks. 

Hand-assembled into a classically styled track machine or single speed/fixie, the Trinity gives a stylish and comfortable ride.  

The wheels are the legendary Halo Aerotracks in silver and come supplied with both a 16T fixed sprocket and a Sturmey-Archer single-speed freewheel on the Halo sealed bearing Flip-Flop track rear hub, which means you can choose to have Fixed or Freewheel drive.   Halo 24mm Courier tyres complete the wheel package. 

Genetics high performance 170mm Tibia polished alloy cranks and Genetic CNC machined 42T track chainring running on a sealed bearing BB give smooth power delivery, whist the Dia Compe BRS101 calipers and Dirt Harry levers provide dependable braking.   

The finishing kit is also in keeping with the overall retro styling. A forged and polished aluminium Genetic Hyoid quill type stem is mated with Genetics Cromo-zone steel track bars wrapped in comfortable Faux leather perforated padded tape.  A beautifully crafted, Brookes B17 Narrow leather saddle sits on top of the polished and laser etched aluminium Genetic Heritage seat post to add an that extra finishing touch.

Product Type: Genetic/DiaCompe single speed track build, Halo Wheels
Short Description: LB TRINITY PISTA SS BIKE 59cm C/P
Web Description:
STYLISH REYNOLDS 531 FIXIE/TRACK BIKE 
A classically beautiful, Reynolds 531 streel retro track style bike for the cycling enthusiast who wants something special.

This frameset is a modern work of retro art with its narrow Reynolds 531 double butted tubing joined together using classic brazed lugs, and mated to butted, tapered Cr-mo curved forks.  
A 1" threaded headset and a 68mm BSA threaded bottom bracket keep those fittings classically simple.  Designed for 120mm width track rear hubs and drilled to accept side-pull brake calipers front and rear for safety.  
Finished in either a gleaming polished and lacquered full chrome or a beautiful high gloss metallic Blue paint with half chrome forks and rear stays. Panelled graphics and gold lug lining complete the outstanding looks. 

Hand-assembled into a classically styled track machine or single speed/fixie, the Trinity gives a stylish and comfortable ride.  

The wheels are the legendary Halo Aerotracks in silver and come supplied with both a 16T fixed sprocket and a Sturmey-Archer single-speed freewheel on the Halo sealed bearing Flip-Flop track rear hub, which means you can choose to have Fixed or Freewheel drive.   Halo 24mm Courier tyres complete the wheel package. 

Genetics high performance 170mm Tibia polished alloy cranks and Genetic CNC machined 42T track chainring running on a sealed bearing BB give smooth power delivery, whist the Dia Compe BRS101 calipers and Dirt Harry levers provide dependable braking.   

The finishing kit is also in keeping with the overall retro styling. A forged and polished aluminium Genetic Hyoid quill type stem is mated with Genetics Cromo-zone steel track bars wrapped in comfortable Faux leather perforated padded tape.  A beautifully crafted, Brookes B17 Narrow leather saddle sits on top of the polished and laser etched aluminium Genetic Heritage seat post to add an that extra finishing touch.

Product Type: 2x9sp Sti 34/50T build, DC Brakes, Halo Wheels
Short Description: LB WOLFSON R3000 9sp Sm BLK BIKE
Web Description:
Using our popular Wolfson frame, which is constructed with Reynolds flagship 853 butted steel tube set. It is a frame that offers a fast, but extremely compliant ride. Featuring variable size sports geometry, custom Bi-oval 853 downtube to reduce lateral bottom bracket flex and improve power transfer to the rear wheel.
The Shimano 18spd Sora R3000 gear system provides reliable shifting, while the compact 50/34 chain set and 11-28 cassette provides a good range of gears. 
Finishing kit is by Genetic. STV ergonomic road bars and a stylish SLR stem, while the comfortable STV saddle is mounted on Heritage seat post. 
Halos sporty White Line Sport wheels are shod with Tiogas well established City Slicker tyres in a wider 700x28C size.  These deliver a fast, smooth, grippy and comfortable ride.  

The Wolfson may look like a pure, steel, race machine, but with 57mm brake drop and concealed mudguard mounting points, it easily converts into the ideal winter bike, truly a machine for all seasons.

Product Type: 2x11sp Sti 34/50T build, DC Brakes, Halo Wheels
Short Description: LB WOLFSON R7000 11sp Sm BLK BIKE
Web Description:
FAST STEEL ROAD BIKE
A premium steel tube frame with a carbon fork, mated to Shimano's 105 performance drive-train and a superb set of Halo wheels.  The Wolfson delivers great cycling performance with classic rim braking along with easy to maintain externally routed cables and mechanical gears.     

The perfect steed for leasure sports cycling, fast commuting, sportive's and audax rides.  

Our Wolfson frame is constructed with Reynolds flagship 853 butted steel tubeset, to provide a fast, but extremely compliant ride. The frame features variable size sports geometry, custom Bi-oval 853 downtube to reduce lateral bottom bracket flex and improve power transfer to the rear wheel.

The Shimano 2 x 11 speed 105 R7000 gear system offers race quality shifting, while the compact 50/34 chainset and 11-34 cassette and GS cage rear mech provide a great range of gears for all your fast road riding.

Finishing kit is by Genetic, with a stylish STV stem mated to Genetic's Driser '4-10' handlebars (10mm rise with aero-ergo profile top section), wrapped with padded Cork Tape. The sporty and comfortable STV saddle, sits aloft the premium finished STV 2-bolt micro-adjust seatpost.

For this build, we use the latest low profile, lightweight RS2 Evaura wheelset from Halo. The RS2 hubs feature Halo's well regarded 120T Supadrive freehub mechanism. The wheels are mated with Schwalbes 25C ONE Road performance tyres, providing reliability and low rolling resistance. The lightweight Evaura rims are tubeless compatible for future tubeless tyre use, if so required.

The Wolfson may look like a pure, steel, race machine, but with 57mm brake drop and concealed mudguard mounting points, it easily converts into the ideal winter bike, truly a machine for all seasons.

Product Type: Shimano derailleur, M-guards, Carrier, Anti Punc tyres, comfort saddle
Web Description:
The Light Blue Chesterton is a lightweight alloy framed urban bike featuring an easy to use, reliable and sporty 7spd Shimano Tourney derailleur gear system.

The timeless upright style and comfortable riding position belie the underlying spritely modern performance it can deliver.  Whether nipping to the office or the shops, or even heading out of town for some gentle leisure fitness, the Chesterton may well be all the bike you'll ever need.

Light, strong 'double wall' heat treated Halo aluminium rims shod with anti-puncture Halo Tourist 35C tyres enable the wheels to cope admirably with the often less than perfect modern city streets and will also allow detours onto scenic pathways with confidence.

A high specification, elastomer sprung Passport 'Upper Class' Squidge-tech Gel padded saddle, along with ergonomic handlebar grips and brake levers with rubber inserts ensure superb comfort for the rider.  

The rust-resistant Passport 'Elements' series chain, stainless-steel spokes and a sealed bearing bottom bracket reduce maintenance and help to keep a cleaner machine.    
With an overall ratio range of 250%, 7 speed Shimano Tourney series Indexed derailleur gear system provides a useful range of gears for the majority of Urban cyclists. The simple push-button operation with an indicator window makes derailleur gear operation a breeze, even for the inexperienced user.  

The Chesterton comes supplied complete with a useful, lightweight aluminium rear carrier that includes a pannier-bag supporting ' dog leg' design along with a handy spring cargo clip.  Also fitted as standard is a full-circle chainguard and 'virtually unbreakable' chrome-plastic laminated mudguards.  The high-rise handlebars allow adequate space for an optional-extra front basket to be installed. This Cambridge designed machine is ready to serve the discerning urban cyclist.


As with all of our The Light Blue bicycles - the Devil is in the detail

The Junit Pro 34mm represents the absolute maximum in terms of performance, tuneability, lightweight construction and reliability, just like the adult versions of the Manitou Pro lineup.

The new Mattoc is the fruit of one of the most profound development cycles in Manitou's history. It is the physical embodiment of "great things take time". It is not an offering that follows the crowd, designed around the latest trend or buzz of the market. Rather, a component that aims to add real value and benefit to the rider. Capable of not only pulling duty in a range of disciplines ranging from XC to light enduro but doing so with zero compromise makes the Mattoc best-in-class"! The lightest, stiffest, and most tunable fork over more segments than any of its competitors, the Mattoc PRO is an amazingly versatile product capable of vastly improving your time in the saddle. At 1750 grams it is a featherweight solution given its wide travel range, yet its industry-leading stiffness lends it to a performance without rival. Consider also its amazing reliability and you have a fork that does it all and does it amazingly. A true, no-compromise, authentic fork, serving the real needs of the widest range of the mtb public and offering serious performance advantages to each individual one of them, no matter how they choose to ride.

The Dorado Air spring with IRT allows for an extremely lightweight build yet a suspension performance derived from our top-of-the-line DH fork. Compression damping via MC2 Sealed Cartridge with HBO technology and a sealed damper TPC for rebound, and youve got yourself an extremely sophisticated piece of suspension technology. Adjustable Air, IRT, Rebound, High and Low-Speed compression make for perhaps the most tunable, personalized custom performance suspension solution available on the market. Include all of this technology into an extremely stiff, reliable, 1750 gram package and you have a ride-changing component that is the envy of the industry

Product Type: 37mm Offset, 140mm, 34mm Stanchions, Taper, 15x110mm
Web Description:
The new Mattoc is the fruit of one of the most profound development cycles in Manitou's history. It is the physical embodiment of "great things take time". It is not an offering that follows the crowd, designed around the latest trend or buzz of the market. Rather, a component that aims to add real value and benefit to the rider. Capable of not only pulling duty in a range of disciplines ranging from XC to light enduro but doing so with zero compromise makes the Mattoc best-in-class"! The lightest, stiffest, and most tunable fork over more segments than any of its competitors, the Mattoc PRO is an amazingly versatile product capable of vastly improving your time in the saddle. At 1750 grams it is a featherweight solution given its wide travel range, yet its industry-leading stiffness lends it to a performance without rival. Consider also its amazing reliability and you have a fork that does it all and does it amazingly. A true, no-compromise, authentic fork, serving the real needs of the widest range of the mtb public and offering serious performance advantages to each individual one of them, no matter how they choose to ride.

The Dorado Air spring with IRT allows for an extremely lightweight build yet a suspension performance derived from our top-of-the-line DH fork. Compression damping via MC2 Sealed Cartridge with HBO technology and a sealed damper TPC for rebound, and youve got yourself an extremely sophisticated piece of suspension technology. Adjustable Air, IRT, Rebound, High and Low-Speed compression make for perhaps the most tunable, personalized custom performance suspension solution available on the market. Include all of this technology into an extremely stiff, reliable, 1750 gram package and you have a ride-changing component that is the envy of the industry

Product Type: 44mm Offset, 120mm, 34mm Stanchions, Taper, 15x110mm
Web Description:
Lighter, stiffer, and more tunable than its competitors, the Mattoc is the desired component for all bikes. The Mattoc Expert should be on your bike not just because it can address all needs, but because it can improve the riding experience in a meaningful way.

The Expert version of #thepeoplesfork tips the scales at a scant 1770 grams yet is stiffer than nearly anything else available in its travel range. Translation: an extremely lightweight and efficient build whose industry-leading stiffness ensures precise and reactive handling ready to outperform any other product it is compared to.

The Manitou Expert boasts an Expert Air spring with IVA, and compression damping via the VTT-6P (Variable Terrain Tune) is our 6-position damper technology featuring a single external compression adjuster that simultaneously adjusts HS and LS damping characteristics. 

It features a fixed shim stack and a secondary shim stack that is preloaded by the external adjuster. The resulting wide tuning range combines the benefits of a Low-speed platform and High-speed progressive tune can suit any terrain. From fire-road climbs to big flowy jump lines to high-speed chunky rocks, VTT-6P can adapt to all terrain with a flick of a switch.

Product Type: 44mm Offset, 120mm, 34mm Stanchions, Taper, Remote Lockout, 15x110mm
Web Description:
Manitou Research and Development (MRD) spent nearly two entire World Cup seasons testing and refining the perfect XC solution underneath elite athletes, with the fork hiding in plain sight thanks to its prototype camouflage. From the first iteration the fork has been securing podiums on the world stage, further proof that being RIDDEN, NOT HIDDEN produces results. In other words, what started off as a successful initial test gave way to an elite feedback loop that produced the most complete XC racing suspension package available.

Little did curious minds know that beneath the intriguing covering lay a killer, of compromise: the MANITOU R8.

Product Type: Fatbike, 44mm Offset, 100mm, 34mm Stanchions, Taper, 15x150mm
Web Description:
The Mastodon is not a modified or repurposed trail fork compatible with large tyre dimensions, but rather it is a fat bike fork made to improve any ride regardless of how low or high the numbers on the thermometer read. Creating such a dynamic fork required all-environment and all-temperature performance testing that took the R+D staff to some of the most inhospitable testing environments in the world.

To earn its place within the Manitou family, the Mastodon passed performance and reliability testing in both real-world and lab scenarios at temperatures as low as -40 degrees. The Dorado Air, seals, lubricants, and all other internals are proven for all-weather performance, no matter how extreme on either end of the temperature spectrum.

Product Type: Fatbike, 44mm Offset, 100mm, 34mm Stanchions, Taper, 15x150mm
Web Description:
The Mastodon is not a modified or repurposed trail fork compatible with large tire dimensions, but rather it is a fatbike fork made to improve any ride regardless of how low or high the numbers on the thermometer read. Creating such a dynamic fork required all-environment and all-temperature performance testing that took the R+D staff to some of the most inhospitable testing environments in the world. To earn its place within the Manitou family, the Mastodon passed performance and reliability testing in both real-world and lab scenarios at temperatures as low as -40 degrees. The Dorado Air, seals, lubricants, and all other internals are proven for all-weather performance, no matter how extreme on either end of the temperature spectrum.

Like all Pro level suspension, the Mastodon utilises the Dorado air spring first debuted in our iconic Dorado model. The newest version of the mastodon incorporates the VTT6 damper for a simplified and more intuitive adjustment. The VTT6s single knob adjusts both high and low-speed characteristics. The resulting wide tuning range allows riders to easily find the perfect set-up for any terrain. These technologies, along with IVA volume adjustment allow for fine-tuning of the air spring curve that adapts to an extremely wide variety of conditions, riding styles and personal preferences.

Product Type: 44mm Offset, 170mm, 37mm Stanchions, Taper, 15x110mm
Web Description: Featuring 37mm stanchions and our Reverse Arch design the Mezzer Pro is the stiffest Enduro fork on the market its also the lightest. How did we manage to accomplish this you ask? Well, its not hollow if thats what you're wondering. In fact, this fork is loaded with technologies such as a fully sealed MC² damper, our proven Dorado air spring, and the life-changing IRT volume adjuster. What does all this mean? It means you no longer need to pick two, you can have the lightest, stiffest, and incredibly adjustable fork all at once.

Product Type: KIT, ACE+CABLE
Web Description:
Manitou Engineers worked diligently to produce a premium level remote system to ensure the riders complete control of the suspension.

ACE and DEUCE combo is a Manitou made underbar remote lockout that controls fork, shock and dropper posts. The Ace lever controls the dropper post while the Deuce lever controls both the fork and shock.

The two levers are stackable and can be built into the configuration that makes the most sense for each individual rider. In other words, the Ace can be built above or below the Deuce and either can be built as a stand-alone lever as well.

Product Type: ISCG-05 fitting Chain Device, Inc, Integral Bashguard
Web Description:
The 2x is designed to work seamlessly with the new wave of 2x9/10/11 drivetrains being specified on many new mountain bikes. These drivetrains created new challenges to chain management with their unique gear ratios, chain lines, and impact protection requirements. The 2x solves all of these challenges. To create the 2x guide, MRP began the process of applying our range of technologies and systems to find the optimal solution for 2x drivetrains, and through collaboration with SRAM and extensive testing it was decided that the ultimate light weight solution was a chain guide sharing elements of the G2sl, LRP, and XCG products. Notable is the absence of an outer capture ring on the cranksets, relying on the front derailleur and lower pulley assembly for complete chain retention. MRP's design goals are driven by the passion to design and produce products that allow riders to just ride - not worrying about chain damage or dropping a chain.

The integrated skid protects the chainrings from impacts without the added weight of a full bash ring. The dual pulley tensioning system ensures that the chain is properly tensioned and in the right position, keeping it on the chainring in the roughest conditions. The dual pulleys also reduce drag and noise compared to other designs, ensuring a better riding experience. Finally, the raised top fin profile prevents the chain from dropping to the BB shell.

Features:
MRP's patented V2 skid removable for those who prioritize weight savings over protection.
Patent-pending dual pulley design provides precise chain engagement while reducing noise and drag
Raised top fin profile prevents the chain from dropping to the BB shell
ISCg
Compatible with 9, 10 and 11 speed drivetrains
Black only
Weight
-34-38T w/ skid 

You may just be the type of rider that should be using some sort of chain guide. Some people, especially those who are pushing hard and going fast over rough terrain, are just always going to need some sort of chain guide. - Mike Levy, Pinkbike 2015.

Product Type: ISCG fitting Chain Device, Inc, Integral Bashguard
Web Description:
The 2x is designed to work seamlessly with the new wave of 2x9/10/11 drivetrains being specified on many new mountain bikes. These drivetrains created new challenges to chain management with their unique gear ratios, chain lines, and impact protection requirements. The 2x solves all of these challenges. To create the 2x guide, MRP began the process of applying our range of technologies and systems to find the optimal solution for 2x drivetrains, and through collaboration with SRAM and extensive testing it was decided that the ultimate light weight solution was a chain guide sharing elements of the G2sl, LRP, and XCG products. Notable is the absence of an outer capture ring on the cranksets, relying on the front derailleur and lower pulley assembly for complete chain retention. MRP's design goals are driven by the passion to design and produce products that allow riders to just ride - not worrying about chain damage or dropping a chain.

The integrated skid protects the chainrings from impacts without the added weight of a full bash ring. The dual pulley tensioning system ensures that the chain is properly tensioned and in the right position, keeping it on the chainring in the roughest conditions. The dual pulleys also reduce drag and noise compared to other designs, ensuring a better riding experience. Finally, the raised top fin profile prevents the chain from dropping to the BB shell.

MRP's patented skid (US Patent 7,066,856), removable for those who prioritize weight savings over protection (43g savings)
Patent-pending dual pulley design provides precise chain engagement while reducing noise and drag
Raised top fin profile prevents the chain from dropping to the BB shell
ISCG, ISCG-05, and BB mounting options
Compatible with 9, 10 and 11 speed drivetrains

Product Type: ISCG-05 fitting Chain Device, Steel Backplate, Inc, Integral Bashguard
Web Description:
Core Series Chainguides
The new Core Series (CS) chainguide line offers riders the highest value in chainguides at a leading price point. The addition of the CS line to MRP's premium carbon and aluminum chainguides, allows every rider to enjoy the benefits of a high-end MRP chainguide at a competitive price.

The new All-mountain Guide is the love child of two innovative and revered product lines, the 1x and XCG. Perfectly suited to the increasingly popular all-mountain segment, the All-mountain Guide features MRP's patented integrated skid protection and shares the freshly updated upper guide from the G3, but lacks a lower retention mechanism. The All-mountain Guide is a great choice for 5-6" travel bikes when used with the latest tensioned rear derailleurs or on its own for shorter-travel trail bikes or hardtails that require bash protection. The contact-free, "upper-only" chain retention means the All-mountain Guide will be virtually silent and completely drag-free when pedaling. The patented integrated skid will protect your crank and chainring and prevent the chain from ever contacting and potentially damaging your expensive frame.

AMg CS
- ISCG-05 mount
- 28-34T
- Premium finish steel backplates
- Low-profile nylon upper guide with noise cancelling co-molding
- Patented integrated skid
- Aluminum guide/skid hardware

Product Type: ISCG-05 fitting Chain Device, Carbon Backplate, Integral Bashguard
Short Description: MRP AMg SLR CARBON 32-36 IS05 BLK
Web Description:
The AMg (the 'All-Mountain' guide) combines a lightweight upper guide and a durable bashguard. Unlike the cheap, flexy, and rattle-prone upper guides found on competitor's products, the AMg features our premium, stiff, silent upper guide and fibre-infused bashguard.

Features

FOREFRONT -The Forefront feature allows for 4-way, front-accessible setup and adjustment. This broad adjustability makes installation less 'trial-and-error' and more 'set-and-forget.'

Pop-UP -The Pop-Up feature allows for tool-free chain access - simplifying installation and drivetrain maintenance. The guide pops-up and snaps shut with satisfying and secure clicks.

Specification
Material: Carbon (SLR model)
Chainring Range: Choose from 28-32 or 32-36t models.
Drivetrain Compatibility: Internally shaped to accommodate even super-wide ratio cassettes and wide chain lines.
Mounting Options: ISCG-05 only.
Bashguard options: AMg SL and SLR 28-32t use bashguard 'A', AMg SL and SLR 32-36t use bashguard 'B'
Weight: 86 - 90g

Product Type: ISCG-05 fitting Chain Device, Inc, Integral Bashguard
Web Description:
With the SXg, MRP delivers a guide without compromise and with no equal. No longer does the desire for protection and both upper and lower retention have to come at the expense of weight, efficiency, or the addition of moving parts - have your cake and eat it too. With the SXg covering all those bases, it's the first guide in history that's equally at home on anything from aggressive, short-travel bikes to Armageddon-ready Rampage rigs, and everywhere in-between. It's a guide that refuses to be pigeon-holed, blurring the lines between typical industry definitions - a little country and a little rock, as they say. But, in this case, it's a whole lotta rock.

High-security chain retention and bulletproof chainring defense in an innovative, lightweight package with zero efficiency loss make the SXg ideal for a wide range of uses. Whippersnapper technology provides lower retention without moving parts or friction. The most advanced chainguide on the market, the SXg is the go-to of the top Rampage stuntmen, World Cup downhill pilots, and superhuman enduro tacticians.

- Whippersnapper lower guide.
- Full-size, nylon HD upper guide with co-molding.
- Aluminum and Carbon backplate options provide a stiff foundation at two price points.
- Integrated SX skid provides safeguard to the chainring and glides over rocks and obstacles.
- Nylon and TPU co-molding in the Whippersnapper provides durable protection from external blows and mutes internal contact with the chain.
- Swingset hardware.
- All installation and adjustment operations are possible with just a single 4mm HEX wrench.
- Available in 30-34t and 34-38t sizing.
- Alloy guides compatible with chainlines 49mm and wider, carbon 50mm and wider. Boost 148 compatible.
- ISCG-05 only.

106g (30-34t Carbon ISCG-05) 
149g (34-38t Alloy ISCG-05)

You may just be the type of rider that should be using some sort of chain guide. Some people, especially those who are pushing hard and going fast over rough terrain, are just always going to need some sort of chain guide. - Mike Levy, Pinkbike 2015.

Product Type: Custom 2-bolt fitting Chain Device, Inc, Integral Bashguard for Norco MY21on
Web Description:
The SXg eliminates ALL possibilities for drivetrain mechanicals or dropped chains, so you can focus on pinning and winning.

The SXg features upper and lower chain retention, as well as burly bash protection. Completely silent and efficient, the upper and lower guides are easily setup for zero rubbing and, with no moving parts, introduce zero drag into your drivetrain. Fibre-infused bash protection lets you charge through rock gardens without a care in the world.

When taking the fastest or gnarliest lines, no other guide can compete.

This version of the SXg is custom designed to fit the Norco range of bikes with a high idler fitted.

Fits 3238t chainring.

Product Type: Carbon Backplate, ISCG-05 fitting Upper Chain Device, Sram iO
Short Description: MRP 1x SLR CARBON IS-05 SRAM iO 28-38T BLK
Web Description:
Eliminate dropped chains forever, so you can ride without interruption.

Features

FOREFRONT -The Forefront feature allows for 4-way, front-accessible setup and adjustment. This broad adjustability makes installation less trial-and-error and more set-and-forget.

Pop-UP -The Pop-Up feature allows for tool-free chain access - simplifying installation and drivetrain maintenance. The guide pops-up and snaps shut with satisfying and secure clicks.

Specification
Material: Carbon (SLR model)
Chainring Range: 28-38t (26-36t oval)
Drivetrain Compatibility: Internally shaped to accommodate even super-wide ratio cassettes and wide chain lines.
Mounting Options: ISCG-05 only.
Weight: 39g

Note: SRAM iO Guides are designed for SRAM charinrings with integrated outer chainguards

Product Type: ISCG-05 fitting Chain Device, Inc, Integral Polycarbonate Bashplate
Web Description:
XCG Triple Chain Device

MRP launches patented XCG Series of impact guards for cross-country bikes

Building on their integrated guard patent*, MRP will begin shipping a new, innovative series of components designed to protect chainrings and cranks from damage due to the occasional rock or log encounter. The XCG guards consist of a replaceable polycarbonate Skid direct-mounted to a 4mm thick alloy back plate.
Lots of cross country riders don't want to give up their big ring in exchange for a crank-mounted bash guard, nor do they want to add a large, heavy bash ring on top of an outer chainring. With an XCG, you can keep the big chainring on and not worry about damaging it on obstacles. The XCG is light weight, and costs a lot less than replacing a high quality 44T ring, so it's a great accessory for the fast and technically aggressive XC rider or for any rider looking to protect their investment.

The XCG Triple install easily on any XC frame and add no rotational weight to the drivetrain. OEM deliveries of the XCG Series begin in April, with aftermarket introduction soon following.

XCG Triple
· Protects triple crank outer rings up to 44T
· Raised upper profile catches chain from inboard drops
· Bottom-bracket mount or ISCG
· Weight: 120g

MRP is a small, rider-owned company based in Grand Junction, Colorado. With countless World Cup and World Championship victories, MRP has been the choice of champions since 1996. MRP's patented chain guides and patented integrated bash guard technologies put them at the top as the leader in smooth, silent, reliable chain retention and drivetrain protection.

Short Description: MRP Rr MECH CAGE GUARD SRAM T-TYPE
Web Description:
The Cage Guard is designed to add a layer of protection to your derailleur pulley cage to help prevent costly damage caused by rocks and debris. By limiting impact damage, the Cage Guard helps maintain smooth shifting performance and keeps your high-end derailleur in top condition.

Precision-machined in MRPs Colorado factory, the Cage Guard is made from durable, low-friction Delrin thermoplastic, designed to withstand normal impacts and glide over rocks. SRAM T-Type derailleurs are known for their strength, but their low-hanging pulley cages are highly susceptible to rock strikes. The metal cages on GX, XO, and XX models can snag, leading to damage and misalignment. The carbon fibre outer cages on XXSL derailleurs are even more vulnerable to impact, risking delamination or failure.

Product Type: Tall Crown race to increase frame clearance -suit 45Deg bearing types
Web Description:
The Riser Crown Race offers 5mm (LowRise) or 10mm (HighRise) of added height compared to a traditional crown race. It can be used to gain downtube clearance for fork crowns, the Noken air-spring upgrade, or to adjust the geometry of your bike. The LowRise version typically reduces head angle by approximately 0.25º, while the HighRise version offers a 0.5º changethough the exact effect will vary based on your bike's geometry.

The Riser Crown Race is compatible with any 1.5" headset using 45º bearings, giving you the flexibility to fine-tune your setup with ease.

Product Type: Front Boost adaptor kit for DT Swiss 350 15x100mm hubs - converts to 15x110
Short Description: MRP BETTER BOOST KIT DT350 Ft
Web Description:
Better Boost Adapter Kits

Designed for:

Converting compatible DT-Swiss 15x100mm hubs to 15x110mm Boost standard

The new Better Boost Adapter Kits allow you to keep your existing 15x100mm front wheel as you upgrade to a new Boost 15x110mm fork.

What makes them better?

There are other conversion kits on the market, but ours is the best.  One competing kit consists of two loose 5mm axle spacers that are a pain to install and are easily lost during wheel removal. Another provides you with just one endcap and requires that you re-dish your wheel to re-center it in your fork. The Better Boost Adapter Kit consists of two precisely machined end caps and a rotor spacer (and requistite bolts), and it requires NO DISHING.

What hubs are compatible?

There are currently two Better Boost Adapter Kits available:

Better Boost Adapter Kit for DT-Swiss 350 15x100mm 6-bolt front hubs

Better Boost Adapter Kit for DT-Swiss 240s "Fifteen" 15x100 6-bolt front hubs

Other compatibility info:

Better Boost adapter kits are not compatible with QR or 20mm hubs, nor are they compatible with those featuring a Shimano Centerlock brake mount. Kits are not suitable for use with Rock Shox RS-1. 185mm max rotor size.

Product Type: Atlas RackPack
Web Description:
The Atlas Rack Pack is a sleek and secure replacement for a seat pack. It sits lower on the bike, improving your center of gravity. Allows your dropper post to move unencumbered, and is locked in and stable on top of the rack of your choice. With four simple straps it installs with ease.

Like all OMM products the Atlas Rack Pack is secure, silent, and ready for any riding condition.
